Name: Data Ownership Protocol
Description:
DOP (Data Ownership Protocol) is restoring control to users over their own data in the Web3 economy. Our protocol enables selective transparency of user data, empowering people to own and control their financial information.

Built on Ethereum, DOP allows users to choose exactly what data to publicly disclose versus keep private on blockchains and decentralized platforms. Granular data control unlocks new usability and business models not possible with today's public-by-default blockchain infrastructure.

Key features:
- Selective disclosure of transaction details, balances, and holdings
- Zero-knowledge KYC
- Dynamic, context-based permissioning
- Internal ecosystem via SDK, allowing developers to create marketplaces and defi Dapps 
- Fully integrated with top Ethereum wallets, dApps and services

DOP brings customizable data control to Ethereum and its thriving ecosystem. As blockchain adoption advances, we believe individual data ownership and consent must come first. Users should have the flexibility to engage without total transparency. DOP makes selective transparency a reality.

Name: OWASP GenAI Security Project
Description:
The creation of the OWASP Top 10 for LLMs list was a major undertaking, built on the collective expertise of an international team of nearly 500 experts, with over 125 active contributors. The team brainstormed and proposed potential vulnerabilities, refined these proposals down to a concise list of the ten most critical vulnerabilities, and each vulnerability was then further scrutinized and refined by dedicated sub-teams and subjected to public review.

The primary audience is developers, data scientists, and security experts tasked with designing and building applications and plug-ins leveraging LLM technologies.

The first version of the list will not be the last. The team expects to update it on a periodic basis to keep pace with the state of the industry. They will be working with the broader community to push the state of the art, and creating more educational materials for a range of uses.

Name: Protecto
Description:
Protecto is the data security platform for Agentic AI. We enable autonomous systems to act safely across sensitive enterprise data in real-time.

As AI agents automate workflows across data sources, MCPs, tool calls, and multi-agent orchestration, they expose confidential information at scale. Traditional security tools block data outright, killing AI utility. Worse, they only detect PII—missing business confidential data, IP, salaries, discounts, and strategic information.

We identify semantically. Our context-aware detection understands what's sensitive beyond standard compliance entities—catching business confidential data, intellectual property, compliance-sensitive information (PII, PHI, PCI), and custom organizational risks. We mask intelligently with format-preserving tokenization that preserves AI reasoning. We enforce zero-trust policies in real-time across prompts, RAG, tool calling, and agent workflows—without adding latency.

Enterprise-Ready: Deep integrations with Active Directory and IAM systems. Policy-driven access control. On-premises and cloud deployment. GDPR, HIPAA, CCPA, and data residency compliance. Audit-ready logging. Asynchronous processing scales to billions of records.

Used by Fortune 100 companies. PoC to production: weeks, not months.

Safetica delivers Intelligent Data Security for modern organizations that need to protect sensitive data, reduce insider risk, and ensure regulatory compliance—without disrupting business.

We help security and compliance teams stay ahead of evolving threats by unifying four critical capabilities:

Data Protection & Visibility
Identify, classify, and protect sensitive data—no matter where it resides or moves.
Ensure continuous visibility of data in use, in motion, and at rest.

Insider Risk & User Behavior Analysis
Detect risky, unintentional, or malicious behavior before it leads to a breach.
Gain context around user activity to surface intent and prevent data loss.

Compliance & Data Discovery
Continuously discover, classify, and audit sensitive information.
Maintain audit-readiness and prove control across frameworks like GDPR, HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and more.

Cloud Security (Microsoft 365 + Beyond)

Name: Turasistan
Description:
Turasistan
Beklentilerinizin Ötesinde...
Diğer tur programlarından farklı olarak, müşteri memnuniyet yönetimi (CRM) ve kurumsal kaynak planlama (ERP) gibi olmazsa olmaz özellikleri ile Turasistan piyasaya hızlı bir giriş yaptı. İlk web tabanlı tur yazılımı olma özelliğini taşıyan Turasistan,  responsive kullanım avantajını da kullanıcılarına sunmaktadır. İster masaüstü, ister tablet pcler ve akıllı telefonlar ile Turasistan, kolaylıkla kullanılabilmektedir. Bu da turlarınızı yönetirken ofise veya tek bir Pc ye bağımlı olmaktan kurtulmanız anlamına gelmektedir. Böylelikle dünyanın her yerinden tüm organizasyonlarınızı başarıyla yönetebilirsiniz.

Basit arayüzü, kolay kullanımı ve gelişmiş modül yapısıyla bilinen Turasistan diğer tur programlarının aksine son derece inovatif tarzı ile de gerçekten dikkat çekiyor.

Özellikle fark yarattığı uygulamalarına bakıldığında, sınırsız parkur planlama, otomatik odalama, sanal pos tahsilatı, gelişmiş müşteri sadakat sistemi gibi aksiyonları gerçekleştirerek turları kolaylıkla kontrol altında tutabiliyorsunuz. Bunun yanında gelişmiş iş süreç yönetim sistemiyle desteklenmiş bildirim modül yapısı da gözünüzden hiç bir şeyin kaçmasına olanak tanımayan keyifli bir araç olarak karşımıza çıkıyor. Ayrıca Turasistan ile çalışanlarınızın performanslarını raporlayabilir ve bu raporlar ile entegreli mükafat sistemi oluşturarak çalışanlarınızın performanslarını en üst düzeye çıkarabiliyorsunuz. 

Güvenlik mi dediniz? Turasistan ThreeGuard / Üç Katmanlı Yazılımı Mimarisi üzerine bina edilmiş bir Tur yazılımı. ThreeGuard ile ilgili kapsamlı grafiği yazlımın resmi sitesi www.turasistan.com’dan inceleyebilirsiniz.

Turasistan, çeşitli satış modelleri ile esnek bir yapıya sahip olmakla beraber müşterilerinin isteklerine ve ihtiyaçlarına göre şekillenebilen, kullanıcı bazlı, modül bazlı, bulut tabanlı ve ayrıca aylık ve yıllık kullanılabilecek satış modelleriyle de kullanıcıların gönlünü fethetmektedir.

Name: Jazz
Description:
You know that one tool in your security stack? The one you'd "accidentally" trip over and unplug if you could? The one that produces more noise than a toddler with a drum set?

Yeah. We're here to talk about that.

For decades, Data Loss Prevention has been the butt of the joke. It's the smoke alarm that goes off every time you make toast - all noise, no signal, and everyone just ends up waving a towel at it.

So, we're here to fix it. And in true startup fashion, we're saying we're in "stealth" while posting on the world's largest professional network. (We know, we know. Just go with it.)

We're Jazz. And we believe the answer isn't more rules, but more rhythm. We're building a DLP that actually understands context, speaks human, and can tell the difference between a cat picture and a catastrophe.

Follow along for the memes, the commentary, and the eventual reveal of a DLP you might not actually hate.

It's time for the new era of DLP.

SentrIQ was built to solve that problem.

Who we serve
- SaaS vendors entering or expanding into the public sector
- Government contractors across civilian and defense programs

- Organizations preparing for audits, assessments, or authorization activities

Our mission is to make federal compliance easier to execute and easier to review by standardizing how evidence and documentation are produced.

Name: Flyingduck
Description:
The application security market is built on a broken, reactive model that overwhelms developers with noise while being blind to the most sophisticated threats. Traditional scanners can find common code errors but fail to understand the unique business logic of an application, leaving the door wide open for the multi-million dollar breaches caused by logical flaws and modern software supply chain attacks.
 
Flyingduck was founded to fix this. We are on a mission to end alert fatigue and empower developers to build securely without sacrificing velocity. Instead of just filtering noise, our platform provides intelligent, actionable insights at every stage of the development lifecycle, from proactive dependency selection to the automated remediation of complex vulnerabilities.
 
Our core innovation is the Flyingduck Deep Logic Analysis Engine, a revolutionary SAST capability powered by a proprietary, on-premise LLM. This AI reasoning engine understands the intent of an application's code, allowing it to autonomously discover critical business logic flaws—like OTP bypass and transaction manipulation—and provide precise remediation guidance.
 
At Flyingduck, we are not just building a better scanner; we are creating a new, more intelligent way to secure software, turning security from a blocker into a trusted co-pilot for modern development teams.
 
Core Differentiator:
Deep Logic Analysis Engine (SAST): Our proprietary AI reasoning engine that autonomously finds and provides precise remediation for critical business logic vulnerabilities that are invisible to traditional, rule-based SAST tools.

Comprehensive Platform Modules:

SBOM - Software Bill of Materials
SCA - Software Composition Analysis
Software Supply Chain Security
Application Security (AppSec)
DevSecOps
AI in Cybersecurity
Code Security

KVKK kapsamında firmalara kişisel verilerinin erişim ve muhafazasının sağlanması amacıyla danışmanlık hizmetleri ile birlikte DLP (Data Loss Prevention) çözümleriyle teknik alt yapı oluşturulmasını sağlamaktadır.

Kırmızı mühendislik olarak amacımız Türk sanayisini en hızlı şekilde çözümler üreterek çözüm ortağı olmak ve ülkemizin ileri teknolojide ki rekabet gücünü arttırmaktır. Sunmuş olduğumuz hizmetlerin takibini ve yönetilmesini yapabilecek alanın da uzman mühendis kadromuzla çözüm ortağı olma amacı içindeyiz. Çalışanlarımızın %20’si doktara mühendis, %20’si yüksek mühendis olup güçlü kadromuzla mühendisliğin pek çok alanında problemlere çözüm üretmekteyiz.  Kırmızı mühendislik olarak bugüne kadar 100’ün üzerinde proje ve analiz hizmeti yaparak Türk sanayisine çözüm üretmiş bulunmaktayız.

Name: Enspi.io
Description:
At GridGuard AI, we believe that securing modern infrastructure isn’t just about locking doors—it’s about seeing inside the system before threats arrive.
 We leverage our unique digital twin platform to create a 1-to-1 virtual replica of your physical infrastructure (data-center, electrical grid, SCADA/OT systems, sensors, network topology) and pair that with autonomous AI agents that monitor, simulate and defend in real time.

What we do
-Build a living model of your environment: every circuit, sensor, network connection, legacy device included.
-Run live simulations of cyber-attacks, physical failures, load swings and environmental disruptions without risking production.
-Deploy AI agents trained on your specific twin to detect anomalies, isolate threats, respond automatically—and evolve continuously.
-Deliver this across both data-center/IT infrastructure and operational technology (OT) systems—giving you a holistic view of risk and resilience.

Why this matters
-In the race between offense and defense, infrastructure is the battleground. By modeling your system virtually, you see adversaries coming and build resilience before something fails.
-For data-centers and critical facilities, this means avoiding downtime, avoiding breaches, and maintaining mission-critical continuity.
-Whether it’s cyber, physical, operational or environmental risk—our platform lets you stress-test, optimize, defend and document compliance from one place.

Our focus
-We’re dedicated to helping utilities, governments, defense operations and large-scale infrastructure providers move from reactive defense to predictive, autonomous resilience. If you’re managing a data-center, a grid asset, or a mission-critical facility and you’re tired of piecemeal tools, let’s start a conversation.

• Azure-integrated pre-processing and transformation for natural language content
• Policy-aware classification and redaction for regulated use cases
• Search-ready schemas that land in Fabric OneLake, Lakehouse or Synapse-backed stores
• Measurable boosts to Azure and Fabric adoption without LLM training loops

Ready to move faster
If you are an end-to-end Microsoft house and your team is still scanning paper then searching by hand, we can replace that with automated pipelines across industries including; Public Sector, Insurance, Extractives and beyond. If Fabric is stuck on unstructured data, we get it moving.

By linking your existing identity platforms to your existing network controls, access is granted only when required, and only to the users you approve. No agents. No VPN. No chokepoints. No pre-auth network-level exposure.

Direct access, low latency, no architectural redesign, and protection that works across brownfield infrastructure and critical environments.

With Knocknoc, assets stay dark until the moment they're needed, shrinking risk, removing exposure and shutting down the recon window attackers rely on.

Description:
Auxiliamos empresas de vários seguimentos a focarem seus esforços em seus negócios, melhorando seus processos e tornando-as mais competitivas.



Soluções para sua empresa: 

Compliance e LGPD:
Compliance refere-se ao conjunto de medidas e procedimentos adotados por uma organização para garantir o cumprimento de obrigações legais, regulamentares e éticas. Isso protege a empresa contra riscos como fraudes e corrupção. 

A LGPD (Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados) regulamenta o tratamento de dados pessoais no Brasil, estabelecendo regras para coleta, processamento e armazenamento desses dados. As duas estão interligadas, pois empresas que desejam se adequar à LGPD precisam implementar medidas de compliance para proteger os dados pessoais de clientes, funcionários e parceiros..

Telefonia Digital IP:
A telefonia digital IP utiliza a infraestrutura da internet para transmitir chamadas telefônicas. Ela oferece vantagens como escalabilidade, flexibilidade e redução de custos em comparação com sistemas tradicionais.

Firewall e Servidores Windows:
Firewall é um dispositivo de segurança que controla o tráfego de rede, permitindo ou bloqueando conexões com base em regras predefinidas.
Servidores Windows são sistemas operacionais da Microsoft usados para hospedar aplicativos, sites e serviços.

Virtualização de Servidores:
A virtualização de servidores permite executar vários sistemas operacionais em um único servidor físico. Isso otimiza recursos e facilita a administração.

Aplicação em Nuvem:
Aplicação em nuvem refere-se a software ou serviços hospedados remotamente em servidores na internet, proporcionando acesso flexível e escalável.

Servidores em Nuvem:
Servidores em nuvem são máquinas virtuais hospedadas em provedores de nuvem, como AWS, Azure ou Google Cloud. Eles oferecem recursos sob demanda.

Suporte Helpdesk:
Suporte helpdesk envolve fornecer assistência técnica aos usuários, solucionando problemas e respondendo a perguntas sobre hardware, software e redes.

Det gælder indenfor sundhedsvæsenet, uddannelsessektoren, politi, forsvar m.fl. En udfordring har hidtil været, at brugerne ikke har kunnet anvende deres egne enheder til at håndtere denne form for mediefiler på en enkel og sikker måde hvor GDPR-regler overholdes.

Med ShareSafe’s løsning opbevares mediefiler ikke lokalt på brugernes enheder, men optages og sendes direkte i krypteret form til et sikkert datacenter beliggende i Danmark. ShareSafe platformen er godkendt juridisk ift. GDPR af advokatvirksomheden Kromann-Reumert og Hertil har desuden opnået en ISAE3000 erklæring. Løsningen rydder automatisk op og sletter brugere, optagelser m.v. efter brug og ophør. Dermed sikres det at personfølsomme data ikke opbevares længere end nødvendigt.

Se venligst vores hjemmeside for yderligere information:
www.sharesafe.dk

English version
Record, save and play digital media content easily and securely via your device - phone, tablet and computer.

ShareSafe is suitable for recording, storing, and playing back sensitive data. ShareSafe is a safe box solution that makes it easy and safe to record, save and play video and audio files. In ShareSafe no media files are stored locally on the users' devices but are recorded and sent directly in encrypted form to a secure data center located in Denmark.

ShareSafe is used within the healthcare sector, for educational purposes and is suitable for police entities, legal affairs, and defense.

Mainsail is a US security company focused on advancing customers' missions and bringing advanced technology to the warfighter. We are engaged in the research, design, development, and integration of advanced technology systems, products & services across Defense, Public Sector, Enterprise, and Critical Infrastructure.
 
About Mainsail
Mainsail is creating the most secure edge computing platform. Our next-gen hypervisor Metalvisor is built to secure workloads from the silicon to the application bringing full-stack protection to edge workloads. Metalvisor provides cutting-edge security protections for mission-critical workloads.

Metalvisor
Mainsail’s Metalvisor is a security platform built on Red Hat Enterprise Linux that aims to protect edge workloads that are outside of the enterprise data center or cloud. The platform aims to defend edge workloads against sophisticated cyber attacks by utilizing separation enforced by security functions in hardware and protecting data in all forms: at-rest, in-transit, and in-use. 
It uses a custom separation kernel at the firmware UEFI layer to provide a secure environment below the Operating System. By implementing security at this level, it is able to restrict threats and adversaries that would otherwise be able to bypass traditional security measures and thus offers robust protection against sophisticated cyber attacks. 

A technology initially developed and used in the United States Department of Defense, Metalvisor is now commercially available and uses Red Hat Enterprise Linux as the foundation for orchestration.

Name: Rixon Technology
Description:
Securing the Future of Financial and Digital Commerce with Rixon Technology

Rixon Technology delivers next-generation protection through Vaultless and Keyless Tokenization, a patented platform that eliminates stored sensitive data. Our Zero Data Architecture (ZDA) replaces vaults and keys with mathematically generated tokens that carry no exploitable value reducing fraud, compliance scope, and operational cost for fintechs, payment processors, and data-driven enterprises.

Why Rixon Technology

Vaultless by Design
Unlike vault-based systems that centralize and store payment data, Rixon eliminates those targets entirely. This removes single points of failure, reduces vendor lock-in, and enables secure, frictionless, and compliance-ready transactions at global scale.

Proven Fraud Reduction
Independent Visa studies show tokenization can reduce card-not-present fraud by 26–28 percent. Vaultless architectures go further by preventing vault breaches and minimizing attack surfaces across payment and data flows.

Lower Total Cost of Ownership
Research from Comforte Insights and Fortanix confirms vaultless tokenization reduces audit scope by up to 70 percent and costs by 30–40 percent through the removal of vaults, hardware, and key-management overhead.

Global Compliance and Performance
Our cloud-native platform processes more than 2.5 million transactions per second with sub-100 ms latency while supporting SOC 2 Type II, PCI DSS, GDPR, LGPD, CCPA, APPI, and India’s DPDP Act 2023.

Looking Ahead
As commerce becomes increasingly autonomous and AI-driven, Rixon’s Zero Data Architecture provides the foundation for secure, agentic payments and privacy-preserving automation where sensitive data never needs to be stored, yet trust and compliance remain intact.

Vaultless. Keyless. Effortless.
That is the future of secure, scalable, and fraud-resistant financial data with Rixon Technology.

Name: Astha.ai
Description:
As AI agents and Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers become critical components of enterprise workflows, traditional security models are no longer sufficient. Astha delivers comprehensive zero trust security architecture specifically designed for the unique challenges of AI agent ecosystems.

Why Zero Trust for AI Agents and MCP Servers?
AI agents and MCP Servers operate with unprecedented autonomy, accessing sensitive data, making decisions, and interacting across systems. Without proper security controls, they represent significant attack vectors and compliance risks. Astha addresses these challenges head-on.

Core Components:
 SAFE-MCP Specification - Industry-leading Security Analysis Framework for Evaluation of Model Context Protocol
 Trusted Registry - Verified repository of authenticated MCP servers and AI agents
 Scanner & Defender - Continuous threat detection, vulnerability scanning, and real-time protection against malicious behaviors
 Secured Gateway - Intelligent proxy layer enforcing security policies and filtering all agent-server communications
 Access Control & Governance - Granular permission management with role-based access control (RBAC) and policy enforcement
 Observability & Monitoring - Real-time visibility into agent activities, performance metrics, and security events
 Audit & Compliance - Comprehensive logging, reporting, and compliance tooling for regulatory requirements (SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR)

The Result? Complete visibility, control, and protection for your AI infrastructure without sacrificing performance.

#ZeroTrust #AIAgents #Cybersecurity #MCP #AI #EnterpriseAI #SecurityArchitecture #AIGovernance #Compliance

Name: validityBase
Description:
validityBase was sparked by a critical question: if I build an algorithm that makes daily buy/sell predictions, and six months later its track record looks amazing, how do I prove those were the actual predictions my algorithm made at the time? And, without a trustworthy way to verify that history, how can I expect anyone to believe me, let alone invest in it?

This problem isn’t limited to trading, it’s everywhere in financial markets. The lack of verifiable historical data undermines the value of everything from investment strategies and risk models to research, ESG scores, and AI outputs. It affects data vendors, investment analysts, hedge funds, alt data providers, model builders, and anyone else whose business relies on the predictive power of their data. If you can't prove what you knew when, you're just asking people to take your word for it — and that doesn’t scale.

Existing solutions, like emailing predictions to potential consumers, long data trials, or launching and auditing a fund, index, or ETF, are expensive, clunky, and don’t scale. Worse, they’re impractical for most valuable forms of predictive data.

validityBase solves this problem at scale with lightweight, easy-to-use tools for generating, publishing, and verifying validation metadata. Our system creates tamper-proof, third-party verifiable records on public blockchain infrastructure, making historical predictive data independently auditable, with verifiable guarantees of the data's timestamps, authorship and completeness.

Portfolio managers and quant researchers use validityBase to timestamp signals and build 3rd party verified trading track records. Others use it to publish live backtests, freeze model outputs before deployment, or create immutable audit trails for compliance and investor transparency.

If you're involved in building investment track records, signals, predictive models, financial research, or anything related, please reach out.

Name: PulsePoint Analytics MRI
Description:
The PulsePoint Analytics MRI is a high-precision, non-clinical magnetic resonance imaging platform designed for advanced research and industrial innovation. Featuring a 0.5 Tesla permanent magnet and a bore accommodating solid samples up to ~150 mm in diameter, it is built to operate under challenging conditions—covering temperature ranges from –10 °C to +110 °C and pressures up to 20 MPa.
It integrates robust RF and gradient coil subsystems, a resilient environmental control module, and smart data-acquisition architecture optimized for dynamic analysis. Researchers and industrial users can visualise internal structural, chemical, and fluid-dynamic transformations in real-time across materials science, geotechnology, energy systems and process engineering.With its modular design, intuitive user interface, and reliable build quality, the PulsePoint Analytics MRI provides a versatile platform for labs, academic institutions and R&D teams seeking to accelerate insights and innovation under demanding experimental conditions.

Name: SILab (Sushma Integration Lab)
Description:
SILab is a specialized human intelligence service dedicated to bridging the cognitive gap between artificial and human intelligence. Our mission is to integrate deep human understanding into AI systems to make them safer, more coherent, and truly reliable.
The Problem:
As AI models achieve superhuman capabilities, their failures are no longer simple bugs; they are deep, often invisible, failures of understanding. These "cognitive blind spots"—in logic, cultural nuance, and contextual safety—pose the single greatest risk to the widespread adoption and trust of AI technology. Standard automated testing is not equipped to find these critical, human-centric flaws.
Our Solution: The Integration-First Methodology
SILab provides the essential human layer of judgment that AI lacks. Our unique "Integration-First" methodology is a complete cycle: we don't just find problems; we deliver the solution. Through rigorous adversarial testing ("Red Teaming") by human experts, we identify an AI's hidden vulnerabilities. We then create a "Gold Standard" dataset of curated human wisdom that our clients use to fine-tune their models, permanently patching these cognitive gaps.
Our Core Services:
AI Safety & Alignment Audits: Comprehensive testing by our expert teams to uncover critical vulnerabilities in bias, ethics, and logical reasoning.
Human Intelligence Integration Packages: The creation of custom, high-quality fine-tuning datasets designed to solve the specific issues identified in our audits.
Continuous Validation Retainers: Ongoing partnerships to ensure AI models remain safe, aligned, and coherent as they evolve over time.
Our Differentiator:
Our key advantage is our curated network of Cognitive Specialists based in India. We leverage a diverse team of senior engineers, linguists, ethicists, and domain experts who provide an unparalleled level of deep, contextual analysis. This allows us to deliver world-class insights and solutions with the agility and efficiency.

Description:
Invysta is dedicated to protecting access to your important digital accounts and networks.  Our patented 3-Factor Anonymous Access Key technology creates a unique access key that uses hardware and software identifiers that are drawn from the computers and Smartphones that the rightful account owner has authorized for account access.  Think of this as the DNA of each specific device seeking account access.

Operating in a Zero-Trust mode, access to your important accounts requires that each user device seeking account access is required to regenerate its Anonymous Access Key in order to be allowed entry to that account.

Name: Werify.eu
Description:
WERIFY develops products and services that enable the use of self-managed digital identities and verifiable credentials in wallets, to be used in business and public applications and portals. Our main strategic objective is to align our services with eIDAS2 and design new verification-based trust services for them.

WERIFY presents itself as a middleware and rule manager solution, specifically designed for high-performance dynamic validation of credentials in real business PRESENTIAL, REMOTE and/or UNATTENDED scenarios.

WERIFY transforms mobile devices, tablets, web platforms, and kiosks into access control and structured information provision centers. This system guarantees the user's privacy and confidentiality, as well as the impossibility of impersonation in identification, authentication, or authorization processes. Werify's services are crucial for compliance with the new eIDAS2 and GDPR.

WERIFY is offered as a SaaS service and is already available in production. Our team will help you with SSI adoption, accompanying you in PoCs, pilots, and steps to production. And providing issuance, wallets, and integration into your business applications.

We also provide in our tools section an open-source Werify kit for those who want to explore and get started in the operation of verifiable credentials.

WERIFY is poised to become a leading force in the burgeoning field of digital identity and verifiable credentials in Europe. Our focus lies in verifying and integrating these technologies into business processes, ensuring seamless interoperability with various SSI wallets within the elDAS ecosystem.

Our approach is driven by the versatility of our rules engine, easy-to-integrate tools, and in-depth understanding of the SSI paradigm. Coupled with our extensive experience in product management and technological adoption projects, we are well-equipped to anticipate and address the evolving needs of the current and future market.

Name: VUNOX
Description:
Na Vunox, acreditamos que a segurança digital não é apenas uma barreira técnica — é um pilar estratégico de confiança, reputação e continuidade dos negócios.
Nosso foco é monitorar, avaliar e fortalecer a postura de segurança de plataformas e dados, oferecendo uma visão clara e contínua sobre o risco cibernético real das aplicações, APIs e integrações que sustentam o dia a dia das organizações.

Vivemos uma era em que cada atualização, cada novo usuário e cada interação podem abrir portas invisíveis a vulnerabilidades. Ataques automatizados, falhas de configuração, acessos indevidos e exposições acidentais de dados já não são exceções — são parte do novo cenário digital. Esses incidentes podem gerar impactos financeiros, regulatórios e de imagem que comprometem anos de construção de marca e confiança.

É por isso que a Vunox nasceu: para ser o elo entre tecnologia e resiliência.
Oferecemos uma camada inteligente e contínua de monitoramento externo de vulnerabilidades e riscos de exposição, com visão de atacante, mas com o conhecimento da arquitetura e boas práticas das plataformas que sustentam as operações dos nossos clientes.

Combinamos tecnologia, automação e análise especializada para traduzir o complexo universo da cibersegurança em insights acionáveis, ajudando empresas a priorizar correções, reduzir riscos e proteger o que realmente importa: seus dados, seus usuários e sua reputação.

 Vunox — Segurança inteligente, visibilidade total.

Name: Truss Security
Description:
Truss works to ease the burden of implementing effective and timely security detection and mitigation solutions for existing security operation tools. By facilitating and incentivizing the decentralized production of security intelligence data to make detection and protection easier and more automated.

The Truss RPC architecture offers a one-stop shop for searching, buying, validating, and automating the ingestion of security intelligence data directly into existing SIEM, EDR, and SOAR tooling. i.e. viral threat detection rules, alerting, detection, querying, and reporting templates.

By leveraging a decentralized network of security experts, organizations are able to outsource their tier 1 and 2 security operation creation and detection capabilities, driving down security rule development costs while simultaneously increasing their security visibility capabilities.

Security experts are incentivized to publish their security research on the Truss Network as each sale and transaction of security intelligence they create and share with the industry equals more cash in their pocket. The faster they detect and publish their research the larger share of the purchasing market will be available to them.

Using the blockchain technology called Web3 Intent, Truss can provide the same level of consensus, authenticity and trust that BlockChains like Ethereum use to ensure payment transactions. Guaranteed trust that the security intelligence data is validated and legitimate, ensures that only reputable, safe, and legitimate security intelligence products are made available for your use.

Alleviate the risk for vulnerable businesses without requiring added resource requirements.

Truss Security is working to revolutionize the way security-related data is delivered to organizations. A community-based, proof of trust, decentralized security platform will reshape how organizations are able to respond to emerging threats.

Name: Tera Insights
Description:
Traditional security systems primarily focus on three types of mechanisms: backend network security (VLANs, secure networks, etc.), perimeter defense (intrusion detection, firewalls, etc.), and security permission management (access control lists, business rules, etc.). The hope is that outside attacks are prevented by keeping the Perimeter secured.

The problem is that the perimeter defenses can be defeated or avoided altogether by an inside attack. Once an admin account is compromised, the perimeter defense and permission management offer no protection; there is little stopping the attackers from accessing all the information within the Perimeter. This reaffirms that traditional data security models, including perimeter defense, are fundamentally flawed. Each occurring breach, compromised server, or hijacked admin account mounts evidence against the traditional model.

The one thing the hackers (and arguably even governments) are not capable of breaching is strong encryption. If the data on the server is encrypted at all times with keys controlled by individual users, a data breach would reveal very little to an attacker. For this reason, the primary defense mechanism at Tera Insights is the reliance on user-controlled end- to-end encryption, not server security. When coupled with traditional defense mechanisms, tiCrypt offers a much more secure solution to data storage, sharing, and processing. In effect, an attacker has to defeat both the encryption-based and the perimeter-based defences to steal data–a much more challenging task for one to be successful at.

Name: Aerosec EU Project
Description:
With multi-country defense projects on the rise, a key challenge for the defense industry is the lack of a cloud-based, interoperable working environment built on reusable components. To enable a true Single European defense market—lowering barriers to cross-border cooperation, cutting costs, and reducing administrative burdens—this issue must be addressed, especially as military programs evolve into complex systems of systems (SoS).
AEROSEC, a €27M, 4-year project (Jan 2025 – Dec 2028) co-funded by the Digital Europe Programme, paves the way for a standardized, highly secure and accredited framework for a cloud-based collaboration architecture and its governance, safeguarding data from unauthorized access. Originating from the European Alliance for Industrial Data, Edge & Cloud, AEROSEC will develop three prototypes to demonstrate military program development on a defense-specific secure cloud:
1 Identity accreditation management for Multi-Cloud security.
2 Multi-Cloud communication services demonstrator.
3 Digital model-based systems engineering demonstrator.
This architecture will provide a common, reusable base for military programs, allowing tailored extensions for the specific needs of the military program at marginal costs while maintaining security. Ultimately, it will support the development of future EDF military programs and European defense flagship projects.
To achieve this, AEROSEC will:
 Define agnostic system requirements and a service framework for a highly secured Multi-Cloud collaborative platform for A&D programs.
 Establish infrastructure for demonstrating collaborative tools in a sovereign, military-specific Multi-Cloud environment.
 Develop service demonstrations for system-of-systems engineering.
 Set up National and European Governance with public authorities for the Highly Secured Multi-Cloud Platform (HSMP).

Sending to or receiving emails from personal email accounts is the number one security gap facing both individuals and businesses today. Free personal email accounts are neither private nor secure; using them for important or sensitive communications puts individuals at risk of identity theft and other cybercrimes. Businesses which send or receive important information to or from personal email accounts are failing in their professional duty of care, are in breach of privacy regulations such as GDPR, and put themselves at risk of falling victim to cybercrime - over 70% of successful cyberattacks on businesses involve emails from personal email accounts,

Name: FenixPyre
Description:
FenixPyre's File Centric Security platform is built on zero-trust principles to ensure all your sensitive files stay secure and in your control at all times. 

Prevent Ransomware Attacks | Mitigate Insider Risk | Enforce TPRM |
Achieve CMMC compliance

Traditional cybersecurity focuses on locking down networks, devices, and people. All of this is done in the name of data security. And these controls often get in the way and frustrate business users to the point they intentionally work around them. All this and yet they still leave the files themselves available for theft once a bad actor is inside your network or vulnerable when an employee isn't following the security process.  

FenixPyre’s File Centric Security platform inverts the equation by baking protection into the files, invisible to the business users (like antivirus), so that files are free to travel (even on mobile devices) and data security is out of the way.

If the main encryption you have on files is disk encryption and TLS then you know your sensitive files are open for theft to both insiders and your next network breach.

The Cyber Insight Platform helps our customers to increase the compliance step by step. Compliance includes both security and data protection standards. The goal is to make cyber risks and regulatory compliance measurable and to enable anyone to adequately address these issues who would previously have been exposed to very high risk due to insufficient capitalization or lack of know-how.

So, just what is this Zero Trust? It's a security framework that operates on the principle of "never trust, always verify."Unlike traditional models that trust anyone or anything inside the network, Zero Trust requires strict, continuous verification for every user and device, no matter their location. It is the only way to make sure that your critical infrastructure remains safe.

At BDATA, we provide QuantLayer, a lightweight and fast solution that gives you full control and transparency over your cyber security. This includes:
•	Passwordless authentication
•	Remote management
•	Advanced data protection

We help you move from vulnerable to secure, ensuring you achieve compliance and peace of mind while your operations run smoothly—free from the continuous threat of a cyber breach.

Vidoc fits right into your development workflow, making it simple to start and scale. We help you ship safer code without slowing your team down.

Name: NetDiligence
Description:
NetDiligence is a Cyber Risk Assessment and Data Breach Services company.

Since 2001, we have conducted thousands of enterprise-level cyber risk assessments for a broad variety of corporate clients, including well-known names in banking, brokerage, mortgage, insurance, clearinghouse, and other financial service sectors. We have also assessed major Internet-based retailers, online auctions, B2B service providers, software companies, medical providers, universities, and a significant percentage of the Fortune 2000.

NetDiligence services are used by leading insurers in the US and UK that offer "cyber risk insurance" for businesses. Insurers like ACE, Arch, Chubb, Zurich, Beazley, Hiscox, Aspen, Brit and other Lloyds of London syndicates rely on NetDiligence risk assessments to support both loss-control and educational objectives. 

As a complement to our cyber risk assessment services, NetDiligence hosts an annual Cyber Risk & Privacy Liability Forum. Featuring dozens of subject matter speakers across two days, our forum is attended by hundreds of risk managers and cyber liability insurance leaders from all over the world.

NetDiligence is also an acknowledged leader in data and privacy breach prevention and recovery. Our eRiskHub portal is licensed by a majority of cyber liability insurers to provide ongoing education and breach recovery services to their policyholders. NetDiligence technical experts assist many of these insurers with cyber liability claims investigations.

Voted "Advisen 2015 Cyber Risk Pre-Breach Team of the Year" by industry peers

Name: Aurva
Description:
Aurva operates as the runtime control plane for Agentic Data Access and the definitive platform for AI Detection & Response (AIDR).

As enterprises move from static models to autonomous agents, traditional security and observability go blind inside the workflow. Aurva secures data in motion across non-deterministic AI pipelines. We ensure security teams always know who accessed what data, through which identity (human or non-human), and where it went next. 

The Technology: Built on deep-kernel eBPF sensors, Aurva traces full data lineage—from ingress and prompts through agentic processing to database queries and outbound calls. In a single system, teams can uncover Shadow AI, map autonomous workflows, and govern over-privileged access across NHI in real time.

Aurva acts as a modern DAM layer for cloud and AI workloads, monitoring billions of data transactions per day with minimal overhead. Global enterprises use Aurva to scale agentic AI safely while staying ahead of regulations.

Backed By: Nexus Venture Partners, Dreamit Ventures, DeVC and executives from Meta, Palo Alto Networks, and Postman.

 Community Edition: Uncover Shadow AI and build your AI BOM with Aurva AIOStack: https://github.com/aurva-io/AIOstack

Name: WitnessAI
Description:

We deliver runtime security for models, applications, and agents, deployable through network integration or lightweight APIs, blocking novel threats before they compromise your systems and filtering harmful outputs before they reach users. Our single-tenant architecture ensures data sovereignty and compliance, transforming security into the enabler of your AI strategy.

Name: Levo.ai
Description:
Software has entered a new era. APIs turned every enterprise into a platform. Now AI is turning every application into an intelligent agent. Together, they form the nervous system of modern growth, fast, dynamic, and deeply interconnected.

But while software has evolved into this living mesh, security has not. Legacy tools remain static perimeters, too noisy to trust, too rigid to scale, too blind to govern what truly matters. The result is familiar: stalled AI pilots, unmonitored API sprawl, compliance reviews that drag on, and incidents that erode margins and trust.

Levo exists to change this. We unify API and AI security at runtime, bringing passive detection and inline protection into one fabric. Because we have the broadest and deepest visibility into everything, we detect everything accurately. And because we detect everything with confidence, we can block with confidence, eliminating noise, stopping real risks, and enabling enterprises to govern AI and APIs at scale.

For enterprises, that means growth without trade offs secure innovation, fewer breaches, smoother audits, faster adoption, and stronger trust.

With Levo, leaders don’t just react to the future of software, they expand it, safely.

Industry-specific solutions for clinics, real estate agencies, and law firms

Facial recognition to match faces against ID documents

Liveness detection to prevent identity fraud

Multi-language document processing for global use cases

Whether you're onboarding clients, managing contracts, or securing sensitive information, DMS WorkSync helps you operate with confidence and speed.

Our world is driving towards the 'Internet of Everything' with fully autonomous machines and entirely new business processes.

Spherity is building decentralized identity management solutions to power the 4th Industrial Revolution, bringing secure identities to machines, algorithms, and other non-human entities.

In particular, Spherity is supporting the introduction of identity solutions in the Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT) market, which is expected to have a value of over €400 billion by 2030 and 75 billion connected devices by 2025.

Name: Salvador Technologies
Description:
When an attack or failure hits, every minute counts.
In OT and ICS environments, downtime doesn’t just stop operations, it threatens safety, compliance, and millions in revenue.
For many industrial organizations, an hour of downtime can cost $5–10 million, while recovery after a cyber incident averages 14 days.

What if recovery took under a minute instead?

Recover Faster. Stay Compliant. Keep Production Running.

Salvador Tech is the first cyber-resilience platform specifically engineered for Operational Technology (OT) and Industrial Control Systems (ICS).
It ensures operational continuity by instantly restoring critical systems to a verified, clean backup - no unnecessary delays.

Our platform helps industrial leaders:
• Protect productivity and revenue: Eliminate costly downtime with verified, instant recovery.
• Safeguard compliance: Maintain validated operations and meet regulatory standards.
• Simplify resilience: Manage every OT endpoint and site from one console.

Our customers - including Fortune 500 manufacturers, major ports, utilities, and energy firms - recover within a minute, not days.

Why It Matters
Most cybersecurity tools focus on detection and prevention.
Salvador Tech closes the gap with resilience.
We ensure your data, systems, and configurations remain recoverable, reliable, and secure, even when attackers break through.

Key Benefits at a Glance:
•Modern, verified backup → instant, automated, tamper-proof recovery
•Centralized Visibility → Unified management of all OT sites and stations
•Operational Independence → Easy to operate by any authorized role, no specialized IT skills required. 
•Regulatory Alignment → Supports compliance across all major frameworks.

Salvador Tech – Actionable Cyber Resilience Engineered for OT

Name: Century Data BR
Description:
A Century Data busca tornar o mundo um lugar mais seguro para viver e fazer negócios, cuidadosamente pesquisando, inovando, desenvolvendo soluções e serviços com comprometimento e responsabilidade por meio de consultoria, treinamento, soluções inovadoras e serviços especializados.

Name: Intellicheck
Description:
Why Intellicheck?

Identity validation and proofing service that uses a unique and proprietary analysis of DMV-issued IDs to create trusted, real-time customer identity verification experiences. Our SaaS solutions are used across a wide variety of industries, both in-person and digitally, primarily as a white-label service.

Follow us on LinkedIn to learn more about industry trends and best practices in identity verification.

Name: Procyon (Now Part of Ping Identity)
Description:
Procyon was acquired by Ping Identity, learn more: https://ow.ly/eme150WHuWo

Procyon delivers a modern, secure, and cloud-native On-Demand Authorization Platform for Enterprises by provisioning access to highly privileged actions through a self-service portal. We eliminate credential sprawl with a passwordless approach to secure critical infrastructure without slowing down developers. We do this with the greatest level of precision and transparency in the market.

Rather than granting permanent access based on roles, we grant On-Demand Authorization for highly privileged actions via APIs to both human and non-human identities. This ensures the highest level of least privilege access and security, as security leaders can rest assured knowing exactly when and which identity accessed which critical resource.

Moreover, we offer unparalleled transparency through our Identity Analyzer, which continuously maps, discovers, and visualizes a full inventory of all cloud identities, entitlements, resources, and configurations in an organization’s cloud environment to uncover any potential gaps or risks.

Name: Dipeeo
Description:
At Dipeeo, our mission is clear: to transform GDPR compliance into a true business ally, serving your company's growth and competitiveness.

- An outsourced DPO registered with the CNIL (National Commission for Information Technology and Civil Liberties)
- Unlimited advice from your dedicated lawyer
- All your legal documents provided
- An intuitive, collaborative platform
- GDPR compliant label

You can too, make GDPR your business ally.

Name: Tune Insight
Description:
Driven by a core challenge: advancing medicine while keeping data confidential.

The story of Tune Insight begins with a simple yet fundamental observation: in the health sector, data is both an invaluable asset and a sensitive resource to manipulate. Their use is crucial to advancing medical research, developing new treatments and improving care. However, legitimate concerns about confidentiality, strict regulations and ethical issues are holding back progress.

Faced with this paradox Tune Insight founders decided to act. They asked themselves a daring question: what if we could access knowledge without directly manipulating the data?

In 2021 at EPFL’s Data Security Laboratory, our four co-founders developed the foundations for a secure solution that combines homomorphic encryption, multi-party computing, differential privacy and federated learning which is how Tune Insight began.

Our mission is to transform the paradigm of the data economy into an insight economy that better protects sensitive data, that is more secure, fair, and protective of privacy and confidentiality rights

Name: Datavillage.ai
Description: Securely unlock your most sensitive, siloed data risk-free and fully compliant.

Name: TransferChain
Description: TransferChain transforms the cloud to allow users to focus on their regular cloud needs while fully ensuring their privacy and security. With TransferChain, you can backup, sync and share all of your documents which can then be accessed from your computer, Android, iPhone or other devices. All of that comes on top of an unparalleled level of privacy and security. Nobody, not even TransferChain, can access, see or read any client-side encrypted user content.

Name: Prighter
Description: Prighter is on a mission to enable companies around the world to conduct international business in compliance with multiple privacy, AI and digital governance frameworks. Our platform offers compliance SaaS solutions which reduce frictions between data subjects and the companies handling their data. Our clients are located on six continents, ranging from small start-ups to large multinationals. We are headquartered in Vienna, Austria with offices and partner offices in London, Dublin, across Europe, Turkey, China and Japan.

Name: Kreesalis
Description:
Kreesalis | The Runtime Trust Layer for the AI-Native World

Authentication was never enough.
In a world of AI agents, bots, and always-on sessions, trust must be continuous and enforced in real time.

Kreesalis builds the runtime trust layer for modern enterprises.

We help organizations move beyond static authentication and reactive security by delivering continuous trust across identities, sessions, and behavior—from login through every critical action.

Our platform unifies:

K Protect – real-time fraud prevention and session trust for account takeovers, insider threats, bots, and emerging AI-driven attacks.

K Control – compliance automation and policy enforcement with agentic workflows for evidence, tasks, and live controls monitoring.

Kreesalis integrates seamlessly alongside existing IAM, fraud, and security stacks—closing the trust gaps they leave behind.

We are building for environments where trust failures are costly:
BFSI, fintech, digital platforms, and global enterprises at scale.

Name: ShareID
Description:
ShareID is the next generation of multi-factor authentication software that detects the authenticity of government-issued IDs in the digital world, guarantees the liveness of the person behind the screen, and validates all the personal data shared with a simple smile.
We are compliant with the international laws of data privacy and protection as we never store users' data or biometrics.

We aim to provide businesses & individuals with a unique and authenticated digital identity.

Name: DigitalXForce
Description:
DigitalXForce, "Digital Trust for the New Era," is the Unified Enterprise Security Risk Posture Management (ESRPM) SaaS Platform enabling Real-time, Continuous and automated GRC through Cybersecurity Mesh Architecture.

The platform offers a comprehensive range of solutions, including attack surface management, risk quantification, automated audit & compliance, third party risk management and much more. Its innovative approach empowers organizations to enhance their security posture while maximizing their investments in digital transformation.

Name: Polygraf AI
Description:
Polygraf AI redefines AI security for critical operations. Our proprietary Small Language Model (SLM) technology enables organizations to detect, explain and mitigate AI risks - from data leakage and compliance violations to deepfakes and synthetic content - using local, explainable and auditable AI solutions.

The company was named ‘Best in Show’ at SXSW 2025, where it also won in the Enterprise, Smart Data, FinTech & Future of Work category. It was also recognized as Top AI & Data Product (2025), Top AI Governance Product (2024), Top AI Content Detection Product (2024) in the prestigious Product Awards by Products That Count, and is ranked Top Analytics Startup to Watch Globally by Dealroom.

Name: TripleBlind
Description:
TripleBlind has created the most complete and scalable solution for privacy enhancing computation.

The TripleBlind solution is software-only and delivered via a simple API. It solves for a broad range of use cases, with current focus on healthcare and financial services. The company is backed by Accenture, General Catalyst and The Mayo Clinic.

TripleBlind’s innovations build on well understood principles, such as federated learning and multi-party compute. Our innovations radically improve the practical use of privacy preserving technologies, by adding true scalability and faster processing, with support for all data and algorithm types. We support all cloud platforms and unlock the intellectual property value of data, while preserving privacy and ensuring compliance with all known data privacy and data residency standards, such as HIPAA and GDPR. 

TripleBlind compares favorably with existing methods of privacy preserving technology, such as homomorphic encryption, synthetic data and tokenization and has documented use cases for more than two dozen mission critical business problems.

Name: Certified Nerds Cyber Security Company
Description: Certified Nerds, holding registrations in Canada and the UK, stands as a leading provider of managed cyber security services. Our firm specializes in comprehensive security solutions designed to protect organizations from the ever-evolving threats of the digital age. Our extensive range of services ensures robust security for businesses across various sectors. We are dedicated to maintaining the highest standards of cyber defense through constant innovation and operational excellence. Trusted by clients worldwide, Certified Nerds is your reliable partner in safeguarding your digital assets and ensuring your operational integrity in today's complex cyber landscape.

Description:
Our software helps companies with up to 500 employees running on Microsoft 365 / Azure become secure and compliant (SOC 2, CMMC, ISO 27001 etc) by automating the long and manual work of deploying tools like Conditional Access, Intune, Defender, Sentinel, and more.

CISOs, Directors of IT, and IT Managers often complain that their orgs spend thousands of hours per year running PowerShell scripts, toggling through all the Microsoft Admin Centers, and navigating through the ever-changing GUI, in an effort to meet their organization's security and compliance frameworks.

Our platform eliminates the drudgery and accelerates the deployment and adoption of the entire M365 E5 and Azure security stack so your org can become compliant next week instead of next year.

Name: Medcrypt

Description: Sling revolutionizes third-party cyber risk management by offering unparalleled real-time visibility and predictive insights into vendor and supply chain risk. Using a proprietary algorithm combining Darknet intelligence and unique technological sources, supply chain entities are given a Sling Score of 1-100, providing a comprehensive cyber risk assessment that empowers decision-makers to fortify against a range of threats that could be imposed by third-parties, and provide recommendations for risk remediation.

Name: Bedrock Data
Description:
Bedrock Data delivers continuous, context-driven security and governance for enterprise data across private cloud, IaaS, PaaS, SaaS and AI environments. Powered by its patented Metadata Lake and Serverless Outpost architecture, Bedrock Data autonomously discovers, classifies and contextualizes data in place without moving it outside customer boundaries. Its open, API-first design integrates with existing platforms and enables natural-language policy enforcement, AI governance and automated remediation at enterprise scale. 

Global leaders in technology, finance, healthcare and biotech rely on Bedrock Data to make data security operational.

This intelligence layer turns data from a static asset into a responsive force, giving applications and AI the context, access, and trust to shape outcomes in real time — enabling faster decisions, adaptive digital experiences, and entirely new classes of intelligent services.

Name: Ironchip
Description:
Ironchip is the innovative security extra layer that protects companies, based on intelligent location and user identity. Our security software is based on transparent learning of user behaviour. The new location-based digital identity is an innovative defense approach against the rise of cyber attacks, adapted to the challenge of digitization and vulnerabilities.

Ironchip detects unauthorized access, our IDS prevents improper access in time, offers passwordless multi factor authentication, it can be integrated into any service and is fully adapted and personalized for your company. It respects the privacy of employees and complies with the current GDPR and adapts to any device, so that users can access all your services in a very simple, comfortable and secure way.

Designed and developed by experts, Ironchip offers the user the perfect balance between security and user experience, in a transparent and reliable way: MFA for SaaS applications, secure third-party connectivity, identity and access management, intrusion detection, single sign-on , business applications, privileged accounts, VPN and RDP solutions, face-to-face control and remote work, email protection…

Name: Preamble
Description:
We help organizations secure AI applications by providing bespoke cybersecurity controls that ensure compliance and mitigate AI-specific risks such as prompt injections..

Our journey began in 2020 after attending the first Joint Artificial Intelligence Center (JAIC) AI Symposium for the DoD. We got to work after realizing the DoD was looking for AI capabilities and no one had solutions for AI risks. In May 2022, we discovered the first prompt injection vulnerability in OpenAI GPT-3. After a private disclosure to OpenAI, we knew there would be a need for robust safeguards to protect against such threats, compromising the integrity of AI operations. In response, we built the first AI platform to secure AI and data with guardrails, combining input sanitation, policy enforcement, and real-time monitoring for secure and compliant deployment of LLMs and AI agents.

Patents: U.S. Patent 12,118,471 (Mitigation for Prompt Injection in AI Models) and pending filings for metric-based control of generative AI.

Specialties: AI Security · Prompt Injection Mitigation · AI Firewall · LLM Security · AI Agent Security · Data Protection · AI Compliance · Trusted Autonomy · AI Red Teaming · AI Threat Intelligence
 
Preamble, Inc. is a veteran-led company headquartered in Pittsburgh, PA.

Name: DigiByte Global Blockchain
Description:
DigiByte is a public, rapidly growing and highly decentralized blockchain. DigiBytes are digital packages that cannot be destroyed, counterfeited or hacked, making them ideal for protecting objects of value like currency, information, property or important digital data.

DigiBytes can be sent over the DigiByte Blockchain and forever recorded on an immutable public ledger that is decentralized on thousands of computers across the planet.

Name: SeguriData

Somos una empresa 100% Mexicana, pioneros de la Firma Electrónica en México, ayudamos a brindar certeza, autenticidad e integridad a tu información digital.

Ayudamos a brindar certeza, autenticidad e integridad a tu información digital. Minimizamos cualquier riesgo actual o potencial en tu empresa para transmitir seguridad y confianza a tus clientes internos y externos.

En Cyte, The PostQ Company, nos enfocamos en la prestación de servicios en desarrollo especializado, consultoría, entrenamiento y transferencia tecnológica, de alta calidad a las personas jurídicas que lo requieran, fundamentada en la excelencia de su recurso humano y tecnológico, buscando brindar bienestar tanto a sus empleados como a sus clientes.

Las organizaciones de todo el mundo demandan soluciones y capacidades en materia de ciberseguridad, con la firme intención de reducir las amenazas en los sistemas de redes y transferencia de la información.

Estos sistemas son utilizados actualmente para garantizar la continuidad en la prestación de servicios esenciales en sectores fundamentales. Para asegurar la continuidad de dichos servicios en caso de incidentes, es crucial asentar un funcionamiento eficaz tanto en la economía como en toda la sociedad.

Desarrollamos tecnología de vanguardia utilizando criptografía post-cuántica.

Desde hace más de 25 años, desarrollamos soluciones de futuro, innovadoras, adaptadas a la era cuántica para resistir los ataques más sofisticados.

En Cyte, reconocemos el papel crucial que desempeñará la tecnología criptográfica en el futuro de la sociedad y la economía digital. Estamos plenamente comprometidos en ser habilitadores de este cambio.

Nos enfocamos en prevenir y contener los ataques cibernéticos mediante la sofisticación y constante innovación de nuestros productos. Nuestro compromiso también se extiende a mantenernos en la vanguardia tecnológica para asegurar el futuro de la seguridad digital.

Name: ClearTrust
Description:
ClearTrust provides security from Invalid Traffic to Publishers and Media Buyers and helps them stay compliant to the Media Rating Guidelines. 

Available as SaaS, ClearTrust comes loaded with more than 100 in-built filters, readymade filter profiles, super transparent reporting, and marquee support. 

We are the most sought-after solution for SMEs and SMBs when it comes to protection from IVT.  Currently scanning more than 100 Billion events in a month, ClearTrust is gaining ground rapidly and positioning itself as a leader in this space.

Backed by Modulor Capital and Pentathlon Ventures, ClearTrust differentiates by using it’s self learning system , intelligence and an open filter framework which allows it to address newer IVT challenges in the fastest turnaround time. 

If you are a publisher, into revenue monetisation, media buyer or are in the advertising supply chain , don’t hesitate to take our free trial and check it out.  We have a promise to not break the bank when it comes to great scanning with the right price. 

We will see you around on the other side.

Name: TrueScreen - Trust as a Service

TrueScreen empowers companies and professionals with patented anti-fraud technology to capture, verify, and certify the authenticity of digital content.

In an age where digital manipulation can easily lead to fraud, disputes, and disinformation, our patented technology ensures that any multimedia file, email and document is captured, signed, and certified with authenticity and immutability.

By securing data at the source, we restore trust in digital information and help organizations prevent fraud, streamline processes, reduce costs, and ensure compliance with international cybersecurity and forensic regulations.

Join us in restoring trust in the digital world.

Name: Osavul
Description: Osavul is a technology company that offers OSINT-powered AI solutions for situational awareness to empower governments, security organizations, and enterprises to effectively counter hostile threats across cyber, hybrid, information, and physical domains.

Name: CONTECHNET Deutschland GmbH
Description: CONTECHNET Deutschland GmbH is a German software manufacturer and was founded in 2007. Starting off  as specialist in the area of IT emergency planning has broadened its portfolio by the areas of information security and data protection through the years. The easy-to-use solutions allow implementing a feasible and holistic security concept within the organisation as well as being capable of acting and providing information even in case of emergency - all „Made in Germany“.

Name: SecurityStudio
Description:
SecurityStudio (or S2) is a Software as Service (or SaaS) company dedicated to making safety, privacy, and cybersecurity simple and attainable for everyone.
 
Bruce Schneier said it best when he said "Complexity is the Worst Enemy of Security"

The S2 platform is built around a simple language called the S2Score and we make fundamental tools available to the market including:

•	S2Org - the organizational information security risk management tool used by organizations of all sizes, but primarily developed for small to medium-sized businesses.
•	S2School - the education-specific version of S2Org, used by K12 and higher education institutions everywhere.
•	S2Vendor - the simple vendor/third-party information security risk management tool, integrated with S2Org for optimal efficiency.
•	S2Team - the information security portal leveraged by organizations to help their employees at home (and ultimately help themselves too).
•	S2Me - the free safety and cybersecurity risk management tool built for everyday people to use at home for better personal and family protection.
We believe that information security is about people above all else.

Name: Meelo
Description:
Meelo is a SAAS solution to make customer onboarding more fluid, secure and automated. 
Meelo combines open data and AI to identify new customers and predict the behaviour of each one. It's a modular solution to fight against fraud & the risk of unpaid 
Meelo, it's a great team that knows your Meelo business, they are great customers Apple, Sofinco, Baker ... You want to make money and not losses, try Meelo !

Name: Saaspro
Description:
Informamos que a marca Sharpspring agora é Constant Contact e a marca Sharpspring Brasil passou a ser Saaspro, representante oficial da Constant Contact no Brasil.

Durante 8 anos tivemos uma trajetória de sucesso como representantes exclusivos da marca Sharpspring - uma das plataformas de marketing e vendas mais completas e bem avaliadas no mercado nacional e internacional. 

Viramos referência pela qualidade dos serviços complementares prestados, o que nos permitiu expandir nossas frentes de atuação.

Por meio da frente Squads, oferecemos serviços profissionais como atendimento estratégico, gestão de projetos, serviços profissionais avançados, treinamentos avançados, consultoria e suporte técnico.

Com a frente Connect, integramos diferentes ferramentas, conectando dados para automatizar processos e proporcionar uma visão clara das métricas e resultados.

Já a frente Dash concentra-se em dados e relatórios, organizando informações e criando painéis para que nossos clientes acompanhem as métricas e resultados de suas estratégias de marketing e vendas.

Apesar da mudança de marca, reforçamos nossa identidade como Saaspro e nossa dedicação contínua em alavancar os resultados de nossos clientes através da tecnologia.

Estamos entusiasmados em continuar simplificando o crescimento para empresas em todo território nacional, assim como a Constant Contact está fazendo a nível global.

Name: Identité MFA
Description: Identité was founded by a team of experts with a passion for doing things right. We believe passwordless authentication should be simple and secure. PasswordFree Authentication is the very first authentication solution designed with the end-user in mind, your customers. It is designed to eliminate passwords in the authentication process. This does not mean it makes the authentication less secure – quite the opposite. One of the reasons others have failed to implement this is that no one gave much thought to the customer and how we can help them make the transition to password-less authentication. Well, we did and we are finding the adoption rate to be rapid and high.

Name: AGENT Digital
Description: The AGENT Digital  mission is to guide our audience through an increasingly complex digital world by highlighting the essential tools, softwares and service providers to help grow and protect our audience’s digital presence & assets in the digital transformation era.

Name: Wired Relations
Description:
Wired Relations is a GRC solution - tailored for privacy and information security. We were founded in 2017 in Copenhagen, Denmark.

At the time, we realised - from our own experience - that compliance professionals need to turn fragile privacy and information security into sustainable GRC programmes through structure, overview and control of their processes.

Name: TheFence
Description:
THEFENCEis a modularly built identity governance and administration (IGA) platform tailored for organizations of all sizes. 

Our software is offering innovative cybersecurity solutions such as:   

- TheFence ARM (Access Risk Management: SoD & Least Privilege Access Control)
- TheFence UAR Plus (AI-powered periodic User Access Review automation)
- TheFence DAPP (AI-supported, identity level Dynamic Access Profile Packaging)
- TheFence IDM Lite (Identity lifecycle automation, Access Request Management)

THEFENCE, “the vulnerability scanner of access rights”,  provides a scheduled and automated discovery of users and their roles, their validity, and entitlement data in different systems and applications. It then automatically performs a measurable, scoring-based risk analysis, which is captured in actionable reports and sent to designated managers or departments. Finance, HR, IT security, internal audit, or IT operations respectively can then revoke excessive, unnecessary, or conflicting (SoD) access rights or delete inactive users from systems.  

The THEFENCE risk policy framework includes a scoring-based high privilege and segregation-of-duties (SoD) rule set that can easily be extended to meet the specific needs and requirements of any organization. The monitored systems can range from business applications to different IT infrastructure layers or cloud platforms, network technologies, operating systems, middleware, or database layers. Moreover, any other custom application or individual technology can easily be developed and connected. THEFENCE is also capable of detecting cross-application conflicts of interest, i.e. conflicting access rights between multiple systems (cross-system SoD).

•	Re-usable Digital Identity (Personal Data Store & App)
•	Identity Verification as a Service (DIATF)
•	Real-time Consent (Remote and In Person)
•	Real-time Data Exchange (Remote and In Person)
•	Certified Digital Credentials (AgeProof - PASS Digital Proof of Age for 16+)

•	Passwordless Authentication (FIDO2)

We combine autonomous controls, forensic analytics, and explainable AI to scan every invoice, ledger line, vendor, and payment in real time—closing the blind spots traditional audits miss.

What we solve:

Finance teams spend huge effort on manual checks, spot-sampling, and after-the-fact investigations. The result: duplicate/erroneous payouts, vendor risk, tax exposure, and fraud that slip through. Netronova replaces manual steps with continuous, automated controls—delivering higher accuracy, lower cost, and full audit trails.


The Defense Suite:

ClearBuy — AI-driven invoice defense (forged/duplicate/high-risk invoices, VAT/IBAN cross-checks).

GhostAudit — AI-powered forensic ledger analysis (50+ anomaly detectors across journals & subledgers).

TrustChain — Continuous supplier due diligence (credit, sanctions, reputation signals).

NovaWatch — Behavioral finance monitoring (spend patterns, policy breaches, instant alerts).

FiscalLens — Predictive financial intelligence (cash forecasting, credit & tax risk).


Enterprise-grade by default:

Encryption at rest/in transit, SSO/OIDC, least-privilege access, tamper-proof logs/exportable trails, observability, and EU-hosted data options.


Outcomes:

Fewer manual hours, fewer payment errors, stronger defense against fraud—and CFO-level visibility with measurable ROI.


Origin:

Founded by a Swedish sales professional who saw a gap in finance where technology and AI could remove repetitive work and protect every euro.

Eclypses MicroToken Exchange (MTE) technology offers Post-Quantum Encryption-as-a-Service (EaaS). Designed to deliver cloud-based encryption with unmatched efficiency. This FIPS (140, 140-3) validated service ensures uses the NIST validated CRYSTALS-Kyber algorithm, providing our customers with unmatched data security across any network.

Unlike traditional network security measures which are no longer enough, Eclypses MTE encrypts data at the application layer (7). Replacing data-packets with one-time unique values and only decrypting it securely on the receiving end. This ensures end-to-end protection for data in transit and at the edge. Preventing hackers from deconstructing encryption patterns or executing man-in-the-middle attacks, replay/delay and injection, packet inspection, pattern recognition, and credential harvesting. Eclypses mitigates the top 8/10 API Vulnerabilies at implementation. Available on AWS and Azure Marektplaces today and deployable in under 30 minutes.

Description:
Defentry is a B2B SaaS company founded 2015 in Stockholm, Sweden. Our mission is to put an end to identity theft.

We offer a cyber security app to your customers, they can be either private individuals or small to medium enterprises. No matter who your customers are, you want them to be able to stay safe online and keep them safe from cyber criminals. 

Our app is customized and white labeled in your brand and we monitor, alert and support our users immediately so they feel protected and safe. Become our partner and offer our cyber security solution as a value added service, just like many other insurance and security companies across Europe.

Identity theft is a crime increasing every year and it is largely linked to data leaks where personal data and login credentials are stolen. Since many generally reuse the same passwords the hackers can access many accounts with just one pair of credentials which makes the damages often much more severe.

Data shows that even after credentials has been leaked, passwords are usually not changed. Why, one might wonder? Most people don’t even know that they’ve been exposed to a hacker attack and that their personal information has leaked until years later. This is why Defentry is needed, your customers will get a chance to protect themselves with your help and you will be able to provide a service they don’t even know they need. At the same time, you differentiate yourself from your competitors and get the opportunity to add a new revenue stream. 

Even with alerts in place, sometimes the worst happen and an identity fraud is committed anyway. Therefore we have added a complete range of identity protection services to our platform. Bank account and credit card monitoring instantly identifies suspicious transactions. Governmental and credit data makes the monitoring complete. On top of that we offer 24h personal assistance and fraud insurance to help handle the economical and legal effects.

Name: Coworkshop Solutions Ltd
Description:
Coworkshop is a leading provider of Data Loss Prevention (DLP) solutions in the Asia Pacific region. Coworkshop's DLP solutions help organizations prevent unauthorized access, retrieval, and transmission of sensitive information.

One of Coworkshop's flagship products is Curtain e-locker DLP, a solution that effectively prevents the unauthorized use of confidential information. With e-locker, users can access confidential information for their daily operations, but they cannot take the files or information out of the company without proper authorization.

The system allows administrators to define control policies for different users and user groups, making it flexible for companies to manage various scenarios and data flows. Additionally, the system provides comprehensive audit logs, enabling management to trace how confidential files are used, making it ideal for audit purposes.

Curtain e-locker is applicable to different systems, including shared drives, web applications, CRM systems, ERP systems, CCTV systems, and even self-developed systems.

During the pandemic, many companies had to allow users to work from home, which raised security concerns regarding users' access to confidential data at home. To address this issue, Coworkshop released shareware called Curtain MonGuard, which enables administrators to display a watermark on the screen of users' workstations. The watermark can be specific to certain applications and helps prevent unauthorized access to confidential information.

This year, Coworkshop plans to release a new product called Curtain Frontier DRM, a Digital Rights Management solution that enables companies to control how their business partners use their files.

As an IT company, Coworkshop always listens to the market and its customers and provides solutions to their questions and concerns.
