Name: ShadowSight
Description:
The Insider Threat Challenge

For companies of any size, insider threat – unsanctioned activity by employees – is often unintentional but potentially devastating. Products trying to solve this still treat the 1% of malicious activity as if it were 99% of the problem. ShadowSight is different. Driven by an awareness that this problem is human-led, it builds an awareness of business context to accurately report on threats in near real-time. This allows businesses to identify patterns of behaviour, shift company culture and prevent financial and reputational harm.

CIO’s, CISO’s and their teams have an intimate knowledge of the problem but are dissatisfied with current ‘solutions’. Existing tools are set-and-forget applications that flood teams with unmanageable activity logs and useless alerts. They also do nothing to shift employee behaviour and prevent risk in the long-term.

ShadowSight – An Innovative Approach

ShadowSight provides an accurate and scalable solution that leads with business context. Insider threat is a human-led problem, and so the solution needs to reflect this. Coupling automated processes with ongoing support, ShadowSight provides CISO’s with a way to shift employee behaviour and prevent insider threats in the long-term.
The ShadowSight platform is implemented within hours – beginning its process of exponential learning. This means the automated processes it provides alongside ongoing support continuously build an understanding of what is and isn’t risky behaviour. This allows ShadowSight to accurately report on potential risk factors in near real-time and identify patterns of risky behaviour. Helping to shape employee behaviour, ShadowSight is a long-term solution for an organisation’s fight against insider threats.

Name: CyberG-Scam Protection For Seniors

We believe security is a right, not a privilege. Founded by two friends, Bharath Reddy and Sourabh Vokalakar, both cybersecurity enthusiasts and graduate students, the project merges technical innovation with social impact. It is backed by real research, user testing, and collaboration with government and community partners.

What We Offer:
Real-time AI scam & phishing detection
Digital safety education for seniors
Guided support
Easy-to-use mobile and web platforms
Emergency tools

Why It Matters:
Every 11 seconds, a senior falls victim to cybercrime in the U.S. Most cybersecurity tools aren’t built for them; CyberGuardian is. We're building digital trust and safety for the generation that built ours.

Join us in creating a safer digital future for everyone.

#Cybersecurity #AI #SeniorSafety #DigitalInclusion #CyberGuardian #SocialImpact #ElderCareTech

Name: secure-transmit
Description:
secure-transmit is a data/file transfer service requiring no client-side infrastructure, no continuing account, and no subscription.  Unlike DropBox, Google Drive, or any of the other file collaboration/sharing providers, a transmission with secure-transmit is a transaction - not a relationship.

Because we aren't a file sharing or collaboration solution, you can use us when you need us.  Neither you or your IT department needs to do anything because  we don't use accounts so no account administration is needed.  It is a transfer so you don't need to manage access controls or do any security administration to your folders or servers or network.  We don't install anything on your PC so you don't have to do any updates or security administration from scans.

Instead of email, when you want to transmit files of any size (including CAD designs or videos), you can use secure-transmit without requiring any security administration to your folder, drive, or network.  If you want to send files that contain your sensitive data (like your Social Security number), healthcare data, or proprietary intellectual property or pricing information, and email or its encryption offering doesn't feel right, secure-transmit helps you feel confident that only the person or persons that you want to get that information - gets that information.  We have several layers of multi-factor authentication (MFA) that are possible.  MFA can be based on email, phone, public key, or a self-created password - or any combination of these.  

In addition, all data is encrypted and your unencrypted files never reside in any file system on any server.  All transmissions are extensively logged - but that logged information is only accessible to you.  secure-transmit has no access to your data - without keys known only to you - because 'your business is none of our business'.

If you want to try us, please visit our website or select the 'Contact Us' tab to reach out for more information.  Thank you.

Our philosophy is to provide our customers, with the software solution QSEC, with a tool that efficiently and reliably supports the (risk) management of information security and data protection in accordance with the requirements of ISO 27001, the BSI IT-Grundschutz and the GDPR. We are always driven to further develop QSEC for our customers, in addition to permanently updating it according to the latest specifications and standards, so that we offer users real added value that saves time and money.

It is especially important for us to offer a flexibly configurable standard solution, which at the same time makes it possible to adapt quickly and easily to complex customer requirements and individual customer needs.

Following the trend towards integrated management systems, QSEC fits into the existing IT landscape and offers the additional possibility to work according to countless other standards through multi-standard functionality.

Our experienced team of experts supports partners and customers with deep technical knowledge and "best practice" approaches during the implementation of QSEC projects.

Well-known companies and organizations from a wide range of industries have placed their trust in the cooperation with Nexis GRC and QSEC for many years.

With QSEC Nexis GRC fulfills the requirements of the TeleTrusT Bundesverband IT-Sicherheit e.V. trust mark "IT-Security made in Germany" and "IT-Security made in Europe".

We are happy to answer your questions!

Name: MarketPeak Research MRI
Description:
The MarketPeak Research MRI 150 is a precision-engineered, non-clinical magnetic resonance imaging system developed for advanced industrial and academic research environments.
Equipped with a 0.5 Tesla permanent magnet, it accommodates solid samples up to 150 mm in diameter and enables high-resolution imaging under extreme experimental conditions—from −10 °C to 110 °C and pressures up to 20 MPa.
With state-of-the-art RF systems, robust gradient coils, and integrated temperature-pressure control, the MarketPeak Research MRI 150 empowers researchers to visualise internal structural, physical, and chemical transformations in real time—making it ideal across domains like materials science, energy systems, food engineering, geoscience, and environmental research.

Name: QHSE France
Description: QHSE France est une entreprise spécialisée dans la création et le soutien de systèmes de gestion QHSE (Qualité, Hygiène, Sécurité et Environnement) pour les entreprises en France. Son objectif principal est d'aider les organisations à mettre en place et à maintenir des programmes de gestion efficaces qui favorisent la sécurité, la protection de l'environnement et le respect des normes de qualité. QHSE France dispose d'une équipe de professionnels hautement qualifiés dans les domaines de la qualité, de l'hygiène, de la sécurité et de l'environnement. Ces experts travaillent en étroite collaboration avec les entreprises pour comprendre leurs besoins et développer des solutions personnalisées qui correspondent à leurs exigences spécifiques. L'entreprise propose une large gamme de services dans le domaine de la gestion QHSE. Cela comprend la création de systèmes de gestion de la qualité, la mise en œuvre de politiques et de procédures de sécurité au travail, l'évaluation des risques et l'identification des domaines d'amélioration en termes d'hygiène et d'environnement. QHSE France joue un rôle essentiel dans l'accompagnement des entreprises tout au long du processus de mise en place de leur système de gestion QHSE. Grâce à son expertise et à son expérience, elle les aide à se conformer aux réglementations en vigueur, à prévenir les accidents et les incidents, à réduire les impacts environnementaux et à améliorer leur performance globale en matière de qualité et de sécurité. En résumé, QHSE France est une entreprise spécialisée dans la création et le soutien de systèmes de gestion QHSE pour les entreprises en France, offrant des services personnalisés et des solutions adaptées aux besoins spécifiques de chaque organisation, dans le but d'améliorer la qualité, l'hygiène, la sécurité et la protection de l'environnement.

Name: Ailuna
Description:
Cybersecurity / fraud prevention and sustainability / ESG are top priorities for business. Fraud is extremely costly for businesses and delivers significant reputational damage when the criminals strike. And with ESG, the problem companies need to solve is that, when it comes to sustainability, employees must be engaged or change will not happen fast enough.

Our guiding principle is that security and sustainability decisions are made by people – employees, customers and consumers – where human behaviour accounts for more than 90% of all incidents.

Ailuna is the world’s first behaviour change platform that brings those two areas together – using gamification and rewards – to reduce risk, embed impactful habits and culture. 

Delivered via our fun and intuitive app and rapidly increased use of AI, we make it effective to develop habits that are good for your business, good for your security posture, good for your end users, and good for the planet. 
Ailuna is based on science and inspired by sports and James Clear’s “Habits with Impact” research and methodology.

- 2021: The Ailuna app and behavioural change engine was developed and tested with consumers in over 50 countries.
- 2022: Ailuna for Business was launched and used by early adopter enterprise clients including Asahi and GoCardless, SAV Systems and Octopus Investments.
- 2023: Ailuna became the sustainability content partner for Europe’s largest mall operator, URW Westfield, engaging customers across 11 countries and 12 languages to consume more responsibly and live more sustainably.
- 2024: Ailuna extends behaviour change into cybersecurity and fraud prevention, in partnership with We Fight Fraud 

We have proven that Ailuna delivers behaviour change for sustainability. 
Our platform caters equally well to customers / consumers as to employees. We can drive any type of change.

Ailuna is Hawaiian and means: "Aiming high, pointing at the moon". 

And that's exactly what our ambitions are: High.

We are building this with companies, legal experts, and researchers who care about responsible AI. If you want open, practical, and enterprise-ready governance, you are in the right place.

Our suite at a glance:

• VerifyWise, the core AI governance platform, model and system register, risk and controls, policy manager, evidence mapping, on-prem or private cloud.
• EvalWise, evaluation and monitoring for LLMs, benchmark prompts and models, track quality, latency, and cost, generate compare reports and red-team findings.
• FlagWise, shadow AI detection, ingest router and app logs, score risk, and create audit-ready alerts with clear triage workflows.
• MaskWise, data privacy toolkit, detect PII across many file types, then anonymize or redact while preserving data utility.

Name: Zero Logic Identity Binding System (ZLIBS)
Description:
Zero Logic Identity Binding System (ZLIBS)

ZLIBS is a novel identity security framework that eliminates credential theft by binding authentication to live user, device, and application context. Unlike traditional or passwordless methods, credentials under ZLIBS cannot be replayed or exported.

Grounded in post-quantum research and Zero Trust principles, ZLIBS continuously evaluates contextual signals to validate authenticity and detect anomalies. This approach shifts authentication from static credential checks to dynamic, environment-aware identity proof.

Name: Qryptic Inc
Description:
In industries like healthcare, finance, and insurance, data privacy isn’t just important,  it’s a legal necessity. Companies handling sensitive data are constantly walking a tightrope between security and operational efficiency. Traditional encryption methods often make it too slow to run AI models on encrypted data, creating a massive trade-off between privacy and utility.
That’s where we come in. We’ve developed a proprietary approach to homomorphic encryption that allows AI models to run directly on encrypted data meaning, sensitive information never has to be decrypted. Whether it’s detecting pneumonia from encrypted chest X-rays, flagging fraud from encrypted bank transactions, or processing private medical records for risk assessment, our technology keeps data safe while still enabling valuable insights.
What's more, our solution dramatically reduces inference time compared to traditional homomorphic encryption methods, making it not just secure, but practical for real-world use cases.
We’ve already built a working prototype and are seeing interest from major industries that handle protected data. With the rise of regulations like GDPR and HIPAA, and increasing data breaches, the timing couldn’t be better for Qryptic to help organizations stay compliant without sacrificing the power of AI.
Our mission is simple: Secure, privacy-preserving AI that’s fast, scalable, and ready for today’s data-sensitive world.

Name: Vault Sentinel
Description:
Vault Sentinel provide a unique cyber recovery solution that allows an organisation to recover in a matter of days rather than weeks.
We tackle the two key challenges of recovering from a cyber attack, the technical recovery and the management of the crisis.

Our philosophy is that cyber recovery should be available to all.

What happens realistically after cyber attack is that either platforms have be lost or access to the platforms has been lost.

Vault sentinel provides a technical recovery without the need for a backup and restore infrastructure and foundational infrastructure. We hold engineers hand through all parts of the recovery including our unique activity and books.

How do you manage what would be the biggest incident organisation has ever faced. Vault Sentinel provides a full command and control functionality to manage the recovery.
Technical objects are mapped to business services and business processes so an entire business service can be retrieved from the multiple isolated volts across the regions or the globe, simultaneously with just 2 clicks.
Commander control can track the recovery with up-to-the-minute recovery time achievable times for technical objects and for business services.

This allows an organisation to demonstrate they are in control of the event, and provide accurate recovery times to key stakeholders, board, regulators, staff and customers.
Recoveries can be rehearsed, fine-tuning the activity books giving more accurate recovery times for business services.

Vault Sentinel is a private tenant SaaS solution which means an organisation can be up and running in a matter of hours.

Working with our partners it is key to define the minimum viable service, MVS, and the operational readiness. The priority after an attack is to provide customers of staff with a minimum service, and we are partners work with you to define the minimum viable service and set up Vault Sentinel to recover it.

Name: Mighty
Description:
Mighty provides the first end-to-end platform that lets AI- and agent-powered applications access and act on private or regulated data without ever taking custody of raw information. Organizations building in healthcare, finance, legal and consumer services have long faced a stark choice: ship under-powered experiences, invest months in bespoke encryption and compliance infrastructure, or rely on third-party models that can’t guarantee data residency or runtime secrecy.

What we do
	•	Headquarters: Client-side encrypted data vaults where users hold their own keys, review every request and revoke access instantly.
	•	Sidekick (SDK): A lightweight integration that fetches exactly the fields your application needs, with no raw data ever exposed.
	•	League (Secure Compute): Hardware-backed enclaves that decrypt and process data in a zero-visibility sandbox; only the final result ever reaches your application.

Problems we solve
	•	Eliminating the infrastructure burden of encryption, access controls and audit trails
	•	Ensuring provable data sovereignty and runtime secrecy without custom builds
	•	Enabling truly personalized, adaptive agents by unlocking private data safely

Get started today

Setting Up the Dynamic Web-Based Firewall and Managing it
Vulnerability Assessment and Mitigating it as well
Setting Up of OSSEC, Rkunter, Clamav, and its management(IDS)
Security Benchmark Scan
SIEM Management and Threat Hunting
Setting Up Honeypot Servers

Glorious Host-Based Firewall Plan

1. Examining the incoming HTTPS traffic in the logs to apply the initial generic firewall blocking rules.
2. Downloading & Setting up the Firewall on the Test Server.
3. Deciding the various factors like how long a malicious IP should be blocked temporarily and at what threshold it should move to a permanent block.
4. Discuss what other applications you want to apply the firewall on like database logs.
5. Studying the database log and creating the firewall blocking rules based on that.
6. Doing the initial Threat hunting process to look out for the malicious requests and creating the blocking rules based on the research.
7. Most Importantly watching out for the false positive blocks and changing the blocking rules accordingly

We would be keen to hear from you as well what kind of security problems you’re facing in your environment and what kind of solution you’re looking for and then we can come up with a flexible and robust solution.

Grazie alle scansioni automatiche delle vulnerabilità software e ai collegamenti con le attività di trattamento, Primatoocloud stabilisce un canale diretto tra Dpo, Privacy team e IT Security. AutoCertNow delivers more security with less hassle.

Description:
It is estimated that cybercrime cost the world $6 trillion. By 2025, these costs will increase to $10.5 trillion. Cybercrime is an increasingly serious problem, and to address it, strong cybersecurity is critical.
According to IBM, 77% of organizations don’t have a Security Incident Response plan, and some companies take over 6 months to even detect a breach. During this period, attackers can do everything from steal data and conduct surveillance, to damage systems and ask for ransom.

India is witnessing digital growth in every aspects as economic growth progress. India is globally the 2nd largest internet subscriber base n still having the pre extraction growth of 48% as per 2022 data. The reliance on foreign technology provider has also increased multi folds.

Despite the digital networks of India are being protected by Worlds all top security solution provider India is the 2nd in data theft. In India the data  theft has been still increasing. As per CERT-IN data 13.91 lakh cybersec incident reported in 2022. Hence  India should develop a full-fledged make in India cybersecurity solution indigenously to limit the reliance on foreign soil.

Cybersecurity is a set of processes, tools and frameworks to protect networks, devices, programs and data from cyberattacks. Cybercriminals launch such attacks to gain unauthorized access to IT systems, interrupt business operations, modify, manipulate or steal data, engage in corporate espionage, or extort money from victims.
Firewalls are essential components of any organization because they protect valuable assets against cyber-attacks. Even if your company isn't classified as high-risk and is small, there's a good chance you'll be a victim of a cyberattack. And, firewalls are virtual barriers that protect your network from these attacks.

Next Generation Firewalls (NGFW) are enhanced versions of standard firewalls that include features such as in-line deep packet inspection, intrusion detection, website filtering, and more.

Name: Polyadmin Incorporated
Description:
Polyadmin Incorporated is a Delaware Corporation and has five interrelated products in development that will roll out in stages based on Consensus Based Access Control and Consensus Based Digital Rights Management-CBAC and CB-DRM.
This new security model ensures Zero Trust by never allowing any one entity to have all the keys necessary to accomplish critical tasks.

Polyadmin Administrator-A new type of administrator account that protects critical assets and account by requiring a consensus-based decision chain. 

Polyadmin Digital Rights Management -Allows revocation of media after release by requiring the media to communicate with other key holders each time the media is accessed. If the media has been accessed unlawfully, such as a movie uploaded after being copied and uploaded, or if the data has been altered in any way, the file can be rendered useless by deleting any one of the keys in the group or chain, depending on the technology stack in use. 

Polyadmin Secure File Sharing represents a method of protecting files and limiting access to only specific individuals and (will) include watermarks to detect each person that accessed the file. In Polyadmin Secure File Sharing, files that are shared externally are given a finite lifetime, and to open the file all members of the group must agree the file can be opened. 

Polyadmin Orchestration Agent takes the idea of Consensus based Access control and applies it to container orchestrations. No one agent or entity can cause damage when configured correctly. 

Polyadmin Data Loss Prevention takes Consensus Based Access Control and applies it to DLP: With Polyadmin, you have complete control of files before and after they leave your security domain, all files have a finite life, and revoking of any one key in the chain invalidates the file-rendering it useless to an attacker.

As drones become increasingly central to modern conflict and criminal activity, the ability to rapidly extract intelligence from captured systems has become a critical operational need.

Today, most captured UAS devices are shipped to distant laboratories, with results often delayed by weeks or months. This timeline fails to meet the urgent demands of field operators and intelligence teams. DroneTrace addresses this gap by developing advanced tools that enable frontline units to conduct immediate exploitation of captured UAS platforms — directly in the field, without reliance on prior knowledge of the drone’s configuration.

Our technology is designed to interface with a wide variety of commercial and modified drones, supporting rapid extraction of onboard data such as flight logs, imagery, telemetry, and control signals. These insights provide actionable intelligence that can be used to inform operational planning, identify enemy networks, and enhance broader mission outcomes.

The DroneTrace technology is designed to serve a range of defense and federal customers, including U.S. Special Operations, cyber and intelligence units, federal law enforcement, and allied partners.

Name: Demaskator
Description:

Demaskator is intended for all companies wishing to establish an anonymous channel of communication with Whistleblowers, and thus meet the obligation imposed by the provisions of the applicable EU directive on the protection of whistleblowers' rights.

The Directive imposes a number of obligations on employers to strengthen the level and effectiveness of whistleblower protection against disclosure of their identity and retaliation. The directive has been in force since 17/12/2021 and is to be implemented into the Polish legal system.

Demaskator runs in the software as a service (SaaS) model and is available for use right after starting the account. Each company gets an individual website address in the demaskator.app subdomain (e.g. my_organization.demaskator.app), which will be used by all people (employees, associates, clients, etc.) willing to file a report concerning irregularities, anonymously in the organization. Depending on individual needs and the selected service package, Demaskator client's instance can be additionally personalized.

By implementing Demaskator platform to handle anonymous reports from whistleblowers, the company gains a modern, encrypted communication channel. It is currently the safest and most comfortable way for stakeholders to report irregularities.

After years of observing failures across traditional SIEMs, legacy KMS platforms, and reactive monitoring systems, our team set out to build a security architecture that eliminates the root cause, passive defense. We engineered a platform that enforces Zero-Trust by design, integrates post quantum cryptography, and introduces a self-healing defense layer capable of responding autonomously the moment a threat emerges through advanced cryptography and quantum proof security models.

Our journey led to the development of the world’s first autonomous Hybrid KMS, a system that combines quantum-resistant encryption, real-time threat intelligence, continuous key lifecycle protection, and auto-healing security workflows. Instead of waiting for alerts, Inkrypt AI actively prevents, isolates, rehabilitates, and restores threats with end-to-end encryption continuity and zero downtime. We built this for enterprises and governments that cannot afford disruption, breach recovery costs, or compliance failures, especially as quantum encryption threats continue to evolve.

Today, Inkrypt AI enables CIOs and CISOs to modernize their cryptographic infrastructure, harden their digital ecosystems, and future-proof their organizations with post-quantum cryptography and intelligent quantum cryptography capabilities, ensuring resilience against both current and emerging threats.

Name: QSI Foundation
Description:
The QSI Foundation is a non-profit organization with the following five primary objectives:

1. To democratize cybersecurity, making it more accessible and inclusive for all.

2. To accelerate the adoption of Quantum Security by making it immediately accessible to directly mitigate the vast majority of today's cyberattacks, as well as the looming threat of Quantum Decryption in the future.

3. By providing a significantly simpler cryptographic key management solution compared to the existing PKI and TLS protocols.

4. To offer a superior alternative to the current cryptographic security standard of PKI+TLS, for managing and distributing cryptographic bulk encryption keys.

5. To ensure that the provided solution is quantum-safe, capable of withstanding quantum computer attacks, such as via Shor's algorithm.

Name: MLS Veri Kurtarma
Description:
1998 yılında bilişim sektöründe hizmet vermek amacıyla kurulan firmamız, başlangıçta bilgisayar satış, donanım ve yazılım hizmetleri sunmuştur. Müşterilerimizin silinen verilerle ilgili yaşadığı sorunlar ve talepler doğrultusunda, veri kurtarma alanına odaklanma kararı aldık. Bu alandaki amatör çalışmalarımızı geliştirerek, kapsamlı araştırmalar ve stratejik yatırımlarla profesyonel bir seviyeye ulaştık.

Veri kurtarma ve veri teknolojileri alanında 10 yılı aşkın süredir hizmet veren firmamız, teknolojiyi sürekli takip ederek hizmet kalitesini en üst seviyede tutmayı hedeflemektedir. Ar-Ge çalışmalarımız sonucunda oluşturduğumuz laboratuvarımız, temiz oda sistemi (clean room), veri kurtarma cihazları ve tüm teknik ekipmanlarla tam donanımlı hale getirilmiştir. Alanında uzman mühendis ekibimizle birlikte, her zaman kaliteyi ön planda tutarak hizmet vermekteyiz.

Müşteri memnuniyetini ve veri güvenliğini her zaman önceliğimiz olarak benimsiyor, en zorlu veri kayıplarında bile yüksek başarı oranıyla çözümler sunuyoruz. Kurum içi sürekli eğitim ve gelişim programlarımız sayesinde ekiplerimizin güncel teknolojiler ve yöntemler konusunda bilgi sahibi olmasını sağlıyoruz. Ayrıca, sektördeki en iyi uygulamaları ve standartları takip ederek, müşterilerimize güvenilir ve sürdürülebilir hizmet sunuyoruz.

Vizyonumuz, veri kurtarma ve veri teknolojileri alanında Türkiye'nin en güvenilir ve öncü firması olmaktır. Misyonumuz ise, müşterilerimizin veri kaybı endişelerini minimuma indirerek, en hızlı ve etkili çözümleri sunmak ve bu süreçte mükemmel müşteri deneyimi sağlamaktır.

Description:
GDPR requirements in Europe compared to international standards are extremely strict and can be a roadblock to innovations in the field of medicine when data transfer is needed. This is why we focus on a truly innovative and robust solution for secure data transfer. 
Our solution is so far unique in the field of telemedicine and a prerequisite for the widespread use of telehealth.
Unlike other known solutions VI-Sio does not store any metadata (name, call-time, date,..).Eventually, telemedicine treatments will be just as secure as the traditional doctor's consultation on the premises of an office.It is not possible to read out what information has been transmitted, not even that a consultation has taken place at all. 

VI-Sio is a unique and independent software solution, the entire software was developed and tested in Vienna. It enables medical care in remote or rural areas and can provide immediate medical advice where it wouldn’t be possible otherwise to ensure access to medical care. As a modular solution, we offer customization and implementation of VI-Sio into existing systems, as well as the possibility to develop and adapt individual telemedicine software. 
VI-Sio is an application developed by VI-Institute (LOGO): www.vi-institute.at
 

Im Fokus: 
“I am not aware of any comparable telehealth product that achieves the same safety standards.” Univ.-Prof. Dipl.-Ing. Mag. Dr.techn.Edgar Weippl, Dean of SEC - Security and Privacy Department, University Vienna

Description:
Het is onze missie om jouw persoonsgegevens te beschermen tegen diefstal en misbruik.

Overal op het internet laten we gegevens achter. Vaak heb je geen keuze, en laat je toch maar je persoonsgegevens achter op die onbetrouwbaar ogende website. Je moet je ten slotte toch aanmelden voor dat schoolkamp, de makelaar of die nieuwe tandarts. 

Maar gaan die partijen wel netjes om met jouw persoonsgegevens? Het antwoord is helaas vaak nee. Het eerlijke antwoord is dat verreweg de meeste bedrijven niet voldoen aan de Algemene Verordening Persoonsgegevens. 

Veel voorkomende problemen:

Je gegevens worden niet versleuteld opgeslagen

Name: xafe.ai
Description:
Xafe is a sophisticated differential privacy platform designed to protect sensitive enterprise data while enabling secure and insightful data analysis. The platform leverages key differential privacy concepts such as privacy budget, sensitivity, and privacy loss to ensure that data sharing and querying do not compromise individual privacy.

How Xafe Ensures Secure Data Sharing

1.	Differentially Private Query Results
Xafe implements algorithms that add carefully calibrated noise to query results, ensuring that the output remains accurate for analytical purposes while protecting individual data entries.
For example, if an organization queries the average income of a customer segment, Xafe adds noise based on the specified privacy budget to the result, ensuring that the privacy of individual incomes is preserved.

2.	Anonymized Data Sharing
Xafe generates anonymized datasets by applying noise to raw data, making it difficult to re-identify individuals. This is particularly useful for sharing data with third parties or publishing datasets for public use.
The platform uses different noise mechanisms depending on the data characteristics and privacy requirements.

3.	Privacy Budget Management
Organizations can set and monitor the privacy budget using Xafe. Each query reduces the remaining budget, and Xafe provides tools to visualize and manage the trade-off between query accuracy and privacy.
This feature helps organizations maintain control over their data privacy policies and ensure compliance with regulations.

4.	Real-time Privacy and Utility Trade-offs
Xafe includes interactive tools that allow users to adjust privacy parameters and observe their impact on data utility in real-time. This helps in making informed decisions about the level of privacy protection needed for different datasets and queries.
By balancing privacy parameters, users can optimize the privacy-utility trade-off according to their specific requirements.

Description:

Prioritizing risk and creating a defensible security program is now possible. Reasonable Risk is a Cybersecurity Governance SaaS platform that goes beyond traditional GRC tools. Reasonable Risk is built by cybersecurity experts and approved by litigators to work as a universal translator of risk between information security teams and all other interested parties. By defining risks in business impacts with legal calculus, the organization can apply resources where it matters.
 
Can you show your work? Why resources were spent on certain controls and not on others?

ARP Cache Poisoning is a hacking technique used to eavesdrop and otherwise manipulate your network traffic. It is of particular concern when connected to untrusted networks such as those found at airports, hotels and cafes.

Name: Trusted Signatures
Description:
In business, trust is currency. You send proposals, contracts, invoices, compliance reports, and other critical documents every day. But once a file leaves your hands, how do you know it hasn’t been altered? And if someone questions it — whether it’s a customer, regulator, or auditor — how do you prove that it’s authentic?

Trusted Signatures provides **tamper-proof digital sealing** for your documents.

Think of it like a notary seal, but for the digital age — and instead of a stamp on paper, it’s a cryptographic seal recognized worldwide by government, legal, and regulatory systems.

Once your document is sealed:

It can’t be changed without detection. If anyone tries to alter it, even by one letter, the seal breaks.

It can be verified instantly. Customers, partners, and auditors can check the seal themselves, without contacting you.

It’s trusted internationally. Our seals are recognized by Adobe Acrobat as “trusted” — no pop-up warnings, no uncertainty.

Go a step further and add your company's verified digital ID to your seals and your customers, partners and regulators can trust when a document comes from you - and alert you when they receive a fake from a bad actor.

If they “care” about your data, why aren’t you ? CaFtcha returns only healthy, human, fingerprint-authorized traffic to your website/app/internet resource. That’s what Turing intended and today, CAFTCHA , dactylocaptcha  and fingercaptcha  are the only proof of personhood or humanness. 
# A ZeroTrust MFA automated gateway where each user is authorized and authenticated based on the human attribute of a physical fingerprint or device pin/passphrase
# ZeroTrust at your fingertips whilst respecting the privacy of the user’s identity. We don’t need to know whose or which finger is being used…Any device-registered one will do just fine, so you can give bots the finger.
# A load-balancer that takes the weight of the entire traffic and authorizes only human-generated traffic requests, so that your server will process only your website’s traffic. 
# The only way nowadays to Completely and Automatically Fingerprint Test your traffic, telling Computers and Humans Apart. With a physical, human fingerprint. Nowadays is a time where all other captchas are easily passed, because what bot can’t recognize the upside down elephant or mimic an erratic, “human” mouse movement, when bots are capable of, if not already creating fully fledged websites?
# The only way to offer a unique, “welcome home” experience, because once your visitor has chosen a nickname and put a finger on it, we can store the device identity and allow the authenticated traffic to flow to your website. 
# The only way your novel, poetry, photography, music or art, technical development or any other original data will NOT be used against your will and intention. Maybe its time for a captcha to work as intended?
# The only way to preserve the integrity of your data by allowing access to those whom it was intended for. Because your work, imagination, creativity, your labor to unearth worlds, offer answers, voice an idea, belongs to those who can enjoy and appreciate it: those who can put a finger on it.

Quantum Data Vault: A fully encrypted, quantum-resilient cloud storage solution that ensures your data remains safe from breaches and ransomware. With decentralized architecture and immutable backups, our data vault guarantees your critical information stays secure and accessible at all times.

Name: ConnexGP
Description:
En el mundo actual, poder identificar en forma unívoca a una persona para permitirle o restringirle accesos en el mundo físico o en el mundo virtual son fundamentales para que los sistemas sean seguros e invulnerables.

Las Biometrías se crean a partir de características que son únicas en una persona, como sus huellas dactilares, pero se pueden hacer inmensamente precisas cuando se agregan otras características que son únicas para cada individuo.

Entonces, cuando no solo tomamos las huellas dactilares y le sumamos su cara, su iris, su voz, etc., esa identificación se vuelve infinitamente confiable y nos permite la creación de un Global-ID.

La tecnología que utilizando hardware y software integra biometrías que permiten una Identificación unívoca de las personas creándoles el Global-ID se llama Atomic-ID.
Atomic ID, ha sido creada por Atomic Biometrics y es Representada en exclusividad para Latinoamérica por Connex LLC.

El Sistema Atomic-ID incluso puede alertar cuando una persona que se está verificando ha consumido alcohol, psicofármacos o se encuentra fatigada o somnolienta. Esta Alerta puede servir, por ejemplo, para impedir que esa persona conduzca un bus, un avión, una maquinaria o acceda a lugares donde su estado puede exponerlo y exponer a otros a situaciones peligrosas.

Description:

We do this by applying ciphers that ensure that data is secure but maintains information that allows for approximate matching. Even in cases in which ciphered values are leaked, data is irreversible to its original format.

We provide patent pending technology that allows matching to be done simultaneously across many data types, securely and approximately. Our technology is available via managed or unmanaged on-premises deployments. Or, through an API that enables integration with existing fraud prevention, biometric verification, and KYC systems. It supports both 1:1 matching for problems like user authentication, as well as large scale 1:N searches.

About ProtectifyAI

ProtectifyAI is an enterprise AI-security platform built to secure how organizations use, build, and run artificial intelligence. Our mission is to empower businesses of all sizes to adopt AI with confidence, ensuring safety, compliance, and trust at every stage of their AI journey. From monitoring everyday usage to scanning model vulnerabilities and protecting sensitive code, we deliver unified visibility, real-time protection, and governance tools so AI can scale without risk.

Our First Product: Guard

Guard is the foundational product of ProtectifyAI, designed to shine a light on “shadow AI” and help organizations gain control over AI usage, before moving onto broader security challenges. Key capabilities:

Monitor: Detects when employees use external AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Copilot, etc.), captures prompts and responses, and provides visibility into who is using what.

Classify & Score Risk: Automatically assesses the risk level of AI interactions (LOW / MEDIUM / HIGH), based on content and context, helping security or compliance teams prioritize review.

Protect: Flags risky behaviors or sensitive content shared with AI tools—alerting teams early to avoid data leaks or policy violations.

Dashboard & Analytics: Provides real-time feeds, detailed insights by user/department/tool, and summary reporting so organizations understand their exposure and take action.

Why Guard Matters

In many organizations, AI is adopted informally—employees experimenting, using tools for writing, summarizing, researching, etc.—which creates potential blind spots. Guard addresses that risk by giving leadership visibility, enforcing policy, and preventing unintentional exposure of sensitive data. Our tool doesn’t just detect; it helps prevent, inform, and shape safer AI practices across the enterprise.

Name: Aegis360
Description:
At Aegis360, we are fundamentally redefining our relationship with digital security. We believe managing your identity and accessing your digital world should be as simple and intuitive as having a private conversation. Our mission is to eliminate the friction of security, replacing complexity with intelligent automation.

The Problem:
For too long, strong security has meant frustrating user experiences. Juggling hundreds of complex passwords, navigating clunky vaults, and the constant threat of data breaches have become the status quo. This friction doesn't just waste time; it creates vulnerabilities when people resort to insecure practices.

Our Solution:
Aegis360 is the world's first conversational security guardian. By leveraging a powerful combination of Agentic AI, Robotic Process Automation (RPA), and a state-of-the-art security architecture, we provide a radically simple way to manage access. Instead of searching for credentials, you simply talk to our AI agent. Need a password? Just ask. Want to be logged into a website automatically? Consider it done.

Our Unbreakable Promise: Zero-Knowledge Security
Trust is the bedrock of our platform. Aegis360 is built on a strict zero-knowledge architecture. This is our guarantee that your sensitive data is encrypted and decrypted only on your device.

We can't see your passwords.

We can't access your vault.

We can't share your data.

Your digital keys are visible only to you. Period.

Who We Serve:
We are building a new standard for security for everyone—from individuals and families seeking peace of mind to modern enterprises that need to deploy, manage, and automate secure access for their entire organization.

Join us as we build the future of digital identity.

Name: Inopli
Description:
Inopli is a proprietary cybersecurity platform developed by Diazero Group, designed to redefine how organizations manage, automate, and respond to security incidents.

More than an incident management tool, Inopli is an Operational Unified Exposure Management (UEM) platform that transforms fragmented SOC operations into a unified and intelligent ecosystem, integrating visibility, automation, and complete response cycles.

Powered by machine learning, RPA, and MITRE ATT&CK intelligence, Inopli reduces up to 97% of false positives, accelerates remediation, and enhances SOC maturity through Continuous Threat Exposure Management (CTEM) practices.

Built for modern SOCs, Inopli enables teams to shift from reactive alert handling to proactive exposure management, achieving faster responses, smarter defenses, and stronger cyber resilience.

From visibility to action, Inopli makes cybersecurity operations intelligent, scalable, and ready for the future.

Name: Data Sync Global MRI
Description: The Data Sync Global MRI is a cutting-edge, non-clinical magnetic resonance imaging system tailored for high-resolution research in materials science, environmental monitoring, geoscience, and food technology. Operating with a robust 0.5 Tesla permanent magnet, it supports imaging of solid samples up to 150mm in diameter under extreme experimental conditions—from −10°C to 110°C and pressures reaching 20MPa. Equipped with advanced RF systems, high-sensitivity gradient coils, and synchronized temperature-pressure controls, the system delivers real-time insights into structural and chemical transformations. Its global data integration framework enables seamless connectivity with laboratory networks and remote data platforms, enhancing cross-border collaboration and rapid analysis. Designed for reliability, precision, and scalability, the Data Sync Global MRI empowers researchers to simulate real-world environments and accelerate innovation in industrial and academic settings. Whether studying porous media, phase changes, or composite materials, it provides the imaging depth and control essential for data-driven discoveries.

Name: OpticalBackup
Description:
OpticalBackup helps companies and organizations to comply with the 3-2-1 backup strategy by providing a different type of media storage and off-site backup solution. Furthermore, it adds an additional safety level by providing immutable data recording.

What is an Immutable Backup?
A backup is immutable if it can’t be altered in any way, it is unchangeable and protected against accidental or malicious editing.
We backup all your data in optical disks. Optical recording is a write once, read many (WORM) data storage technology. Data stored on a WORM-compliant device is considered immutable

Key Features of Immutable OpticalBackup:

1) Impossible to Delete
2) Impossible do Edit
3) Impossible to Encrypt
4) Impossible to Infect

With OpticalBackup you can start protecting your data with immutable recording media today without worrying about: hardware purchase or compatibility, storage conditions, scale-up, long term storage, data backup management, data security and access, redundant copies, optical disk management, file searching and file recovery. 

All data written in magnetic devices such as hard-drive, pens, SSD and tapes are prone to be encrypted and deleted if a hacker gets access to the necessary credentials. This is the typical data loss incident that causes business disruption and immeasurable costs. 

Additionally, if all your data (including backups) is saved in magnetic devices, it can be accidentally deleted, overwritten or corrupted.

One solution to guarantee data recording immutability is the use of optical recording media. Optical recording is a write once, read many (WORM) data storage technology. Data stored on a WORM-compliant device is considered immutable; authorized users can read the data, but they cannot change it.

Parceiro Oficial Keepit no Brasil. Protegemos dados críticos de negócios em Microsoft 365 e Google Workspace contra perda acidental, ransomware e não-conformidade regulatória.

Fundada em 2025 sob direção estratégica da Synapse B2B, aplicamos Engenharia de Receita ao mercado de cyber resilience. Não competimos em feature list técnico. Competimos em clareza de risco: quanto custa sua empresa parada 48 horas esperando recuperação de dados?

O problema que resolvemos:
Google Workspace e Microsoft 365 não fazem backup dos seus dados. A maioria dos decisores assume que sim. Quando percebem que estão desprotegidos, já perderam arquivos críticos ou enfrentam auditoria LGPD sem evidências de backup.

Nossa abordagem:
→ Compliance LGPD garantido (backup imutável, auditável)
→ Proteção contra ransomware (recuperação em horas, não dias)
→ Implementação sem fricção operacional
→ ROI tangível: paz de espírito regulatória + continuidade de negócio

Resultado validado: Primeira venda em 45 dias (1.200+ usuários, empresa nacional). Metodologia testada sob condições reais de mercado.

Keepit: Líder global em SaaS backup. Única solução 100% cloud-native, sem dependência de infraestrutura local.

Indústrias atendidas: Educação · Saúde · Serviços Profissionais · Tecnologia · Jurídico

Name: PromptShield
Description:
Every day, teams unknowingly paste sensitive data into GenAI platforms:  PII / PHI  Source code, secrets, API keys  Internal docs and strategy notes

This is Shadow AI — when employees use AI tools like ChatGPT or Claude without security oversight. It’s exploding across enterprises, and the risk is real: data leaks, compliance violations, and fines over $5M.

That’s why we built PromptShield —a data loss prevention (DLP) browser extension for GenAI plaforms.

 What it Does
 Monitors AI input (text + file uploads) before it’s sent
 Detects 150+ types of sensitive data
 Blocks risky prompts, allows business-justified overrides
 Admin controls, audit trails, and reporting
 Sub-second analysis with Slack / SIEM / webhook alerts
 Works with 18+ platforms (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.)
 Developer API for custom integrations
 Installs in seconds via managed Chrome policies — perfect for enterprise rollouts at scale

 Who It’s For: CISOs, Security Engineers, Product Teams, Compliance Leaders, Developers, and Founders

Try it free at https://promptshield.cloud — and let us know:

Name: Perfect Circles Platform
Description:
Hey LinkedIn fam! It's Steve here, the proud co-ringmaster of Perfect Circles, where the only thing rounder than our business model is the circles under my eyes from late-night coding sessions. 

When Tristram and I decided to dive into the startup world, we thought, "How hard can it be?" Well, let's just say we've learned that entrepreneurship is like juggling flaming swords while riding a unicycle. But hey, we're in it for the thrill and the occasional applause! 

Perfect Circles is our little slice of software heaven based right here in Australia. We’re on a mission to help small and medium businesses streamline their operations with our Business Core and Asset Manager tools. Whether it's managing quotes, invoices, or tracking assets, we've got you covered—just don't ask us to find your missing socks. 

Our pricing is as straightforward as Tristram's coffee order: Essentials, Advanced, and Unlimited. We even have an Asset Manager plan for those who love to micromanage their inventory down to the last paperclip. 

Our secret sauce? Combining Tristram’s logistics wizardry with my sustainability dreams, all while keeping things simple and efficient. We’re leveraging AI to estimate everything from embodied carbon to asset depreciation, so you can focus on what you do best—running your business.

We're still in our startup phase, which means we're as fresh as a morning latte, and just as ambitious. Our current revenue? Let's just say it's a work in progress. But we're determined to hit that $1–5k/month milestone soon, and maybe even hire a few more brave souls to join our circus.

So, if you're a small to medium business looking for a software solution that’s as easy to use as a Sunday morning, come join the Perfect Circles family. And if you're just here for the comedy, well, stick around—there's plenty more where this came from! 

P.S. If you see Tristram, tell him to stop rearranging the office furniture. Again.

Name: FortifyQL (Open Source)
Description:
FortifyQL is a sophisticated security scanning tool designed to provide developers with deep insights into potential security vulnerabilities within their GraphQL API's. 

FortifyQL dynamically generates queries that emulate common attacks identified by the Open Web Application Security Project (OWASP). The responses are analyzed for insecure default configurations and missing security measures that may lead to Injection, Denial of Service (DOS), and Batching attacks. The data is displayed within an intuitive and user-friendly interface, making it accessible to developers of all skill levels.

Name: Control C Limited
Description:
About Control-C
Enterprise-Grade SaaS Data Backup & Access
At Control-C, we believe businesses should own their data. Relying solely on a single copy held by a third-party platform introduces unnecessary risk, no matter your business size. With 12+ years of experience, we’ve become the trusted backup partner for thousands of Xero and Cin7 users globally, delivering enterprise-level protection, platform independence, and peace of mind.

What We Do
Control-C delivers automated, secure, and fully independent backup solutions for:
•	Xero and Xero Practice Manager: Daily and on-demand backups of accounting data, with export options (XML, XLSX, PDF), ensuring compliance, audit readiness, and business continuity—even when Xero is down.
•	Cin7 Omni: Holistic backup coverage for inventory and order management data, defending against accidental deletions, system issues, or cyberattacks.

Why It Matters
Xero and Cin7 are robust SaaS platforms, but their native features don’t shield you from all risks. Users retain a shared responsibility, as outlined in Terms of Use, to keep their own backups. Threats like user error, hacking, and outages can jeopardize your critical data.
Control-C keeps your data:
•	Always accessible
•	Secure
•	Compliant
•	Platform independent

Beyond Backup: Intelligent Data Access & Unlimited History
We offer unlimited historical versions, empowering forensic teams or users to trace changes, investigate modifications, or recover lost information with unprecedented detail and ease. Our intuitive UI/UX makes it easy for users to access, search, and interact with their information whenever needed.

Who We Serve
•	Cin7 & Xero end users
•	Xero Premium Tier clients seeking disaster recovery
•	MSPs and CPA firms wanting robust backup offerings

Our Promise
We’re not a startup experiment—we’re a trusted, proven partner. With thousands protected worldwide, Control-C uniquely delivers platform independence and real enterprise resilience for Xero and Cin7 customers.

Description:

We offer a cloud-based access control system that is designed to provide our clients with a secure, flexible, and convenient way to manage access to their premises. One of our key features is the use of mobile's NFC technology, which allows users to unlock the door with a simple tap on their phone. At the same time, the admin officers could issue an access card to the guests and users virtually through cloud technology. This means that your guests can enter the building quickly and easily without the need for physical keys or access cards anymore.

Our solution is designed in a way that is highly compatible with our partner’s existing access control system, and so to avoid the excessive cost or complicated procedures to rebuild their entire system. Our target clients include but are not limited to hotels, universities, co-working spaces, housing estates, etc.

Our vision is to offer an all in one “virtual key” solution to everyone. Just like Apple Pay, no matter if you are going to work, coming back home, accessing your gym room, visiting a library, or going on a vacation, you no longer need to carry a bunch of access cards with you. At the same time, our clients do not have to worry about their customers losing their access cards or having long administrative procedures to issue a physical card. OKey could be the trusted partners to offer a seamless and secure solution.

Name: MédiGuard
Description:
Médiguard est une startup axée sur la protection de la santé et la sécurité des données médicales. Nous avons créé une blockchain privée innovante pour centraliser les données médicales et permettre aux individus de garder une maîtrise totale sur leurs informations de santé. Nous voulons simplifier le processus de gestion des données médicales et réduire les risques pour les patients et les professionnels de la santé.

 Notre histoire a commencé avec la conviction que les données médicales sont un élément crucial pour assurer la qualité des soins de santé. Nous avons observé de près les défis auxquels sont confrontés les patients et les professionnels de la santé en matière de stockage et de partage des données médicales. Nous avons également pris en compte les problèmes de sécurité et de confidentialité des données médicales qui ont souvent des conséquences graves pour les patients.

 Nous avons donc créé une plateforme innovante qui permet de stocker et de gérer facilement les données médicales des patients en toute sécurité. En utilisant une blockchain privée, nous garantissons que les données médicales sont stockées de manière transparente, sécurisée et sans risque d'être altérées ou piratées. Nous avons également intégré des fonctionnalités de synthétisation automatique des dossiers médicaux et de prévention des risques potentiels en fonction du dossier du patient, pour faciliter le processus de gestion des données.

 Nous sommes convaincus que notre solution peut améliorer considérablement la qualité des soins de santé. Notre objectif est de permettre aux individus d’avoir une maîtrise totale de leurs données médicales, regroupées dans une même plateforme ergonomique et simple d’utilisation, tout en offrant une solution pratique et sécurisée aux professionnels de la santé pour stocker et gérer les données des patients.

Atualmente oferecemos cinco serviços integrados:

 Consulta de Zoneamento Urbano Atualizado
Realizamos consultas automatizadas de zoneamento em todo o Brasil, com base em legislações municipais, mapas oficiais e planos diretores, fornecendo informações como coeficiente de aproveitamento, taxa de ocupação, recuos mínimos, permissões de uso e viabilidade construtiva — tudo de forma clara e objetiva.

Com simulação interativa e visual, entregamos a trajetória do sol em qualquer ponto do Brasil, considerando data, horário, orientação e sombras geradas. Ideal para estudos de ventilação, conforto térmico e implantação de edificações.

 Calculadora de Quantitativos de Materiais
Com base em áreas e medidas informadas, nossa IA calcula automaticamente os materiais necessários para cada etapa da obra: alvenaria, concreto, reboco, pisos, pintura, entre outros — com margem de perda técnica ajustável.

 Comparador de Preços de Materiais por Região
Pesquisamos em tempo real os melhores preços de materiais de construção em lojas físicas e online, considerando frete, estoque, forma de pagamento e reputação das lojas.

 Especialista em Normas Técnicas ABNT
Nosso chat técnico é capaz de consultar, interpretar e explicar centenas de normas da ABNT, trazendo as exigências e recomendações aplicáveis a cada situação, inclusive com apoio visual.

Seja para projetar, planejar, orçar ou construir, o UrbanGuide é sua central técnica automatizada — pronta para elevar o padrão e a eficiência do seu trabalho.

Diese Methode wird von einem Team aus Experten mit jahrzehntelanger Erfahrung entwickelt, wobei nationale Polizeibehörden laufend wertvolles Feedback und Input liefern, um die Qualität der Ergebnisse zu verbessern. 

Einsatzbereiche:
(1)	Unterstützung laufender Ermittlungen mit aktuellem Datenbestand, der kontinuierlich erweitert wird.
(2)	Verknüpfung unterschiedlicher Datenarten (wie z.B. Dokumente, Fotos, Gesprächsmitschnitte) und Integration externer Quellen (wie z.B. Fahrpläne, Wetterdaten). 
(3)	Cold Case Ermittlungen mit abgeschlossenem Datenbestand, der nur teilweise digital zur Verfügung steht.
(4)	Aufbereitung der Informationen in gerichtsverwertbare Dokumente mit vollständiger Historie und digitaler Signatur. 

Unser Ziel ist die Analyse komplexer Daten im juristischen Umfeld und einer nachvollziehbaren Darstellung des Sachverhaltes.

Technology and digital infrastructures are in a state of constant transformation. When it comes to security, this evolution moves even faster. However, passwords, which form the foundation of authentication, have remained in use for decades. Although various alternative authentication methods have been developed, it has not been possible to eliminate passwords entirely.

LeakData aims to raise awareness among both individuals and organizations by making compromised data—primarily passwords—accessible. Our goal is to highlight the risks posed by cyber threats and to help ensure that necessary security measures are implemented swiftly.

Detecting compromised data before it can be exploited by attackers and taking the required actions is as critical as preventing the breach itself. LeakData empowers organizations to strengthen their security posture and enables users to better protect their digital identities.

Name: IZOData - Solution de consentement sécurisé
Description:
Présentation de l'Application
IZOData est une application innovante spécialement conçue pour répondre aux exigences de la nouvelle loi 25 du Québec sur la protection des données personnelles. En cette ère numérique où la confidentialité et la sécurité sont primordiales, IZOData offre une plateforme fiable pour la sollicitation et le partage sécurisés de divers types d'informations personnelles, allant des pièces d'identité et données bancaires jusqu'aux informations médicales.

Sécurité et Transparence
L'application IZOData repose sur une architecture de sécurité robuste, garantissant ainsi que toutes les transactions et les échanges de données sont hautement sécurisés. De plus, la transparence est notre priorité : chaque utilisateur est pleinement informé du type de données demandé, de l'utilisation qui en sera faite et des parties avec lesquelles ces données seront partagées.

Le Consentement Éclairé au Cœur de notre Démarche
La nouvelle loi 25 met l'accent sur l'importance du consentement éclairé, et IZOData l'a intégré dans son ADN. Avant toute transaction, l'application présente un résumé clair des données qui seront partagées, les raisons du partage, et requiert le consentement explicite de l'utilisateur. Ce processus permet de s'assurer que le consentement est non seulement donné, mais également bien compris.

Les Bénéfices d'IZOData
Conformité: Une solution clef en main pour se conformer à la loi 25.

Sécurité renforcée: Grâce à des protocoles de sécurité de pointe, vos données sont entre de bonnes mains.

Transparence: Des explications claires et compréhensibles vous permettent de savoir exactement à quoi vous consentez.

Flexibilité: Gérez divers types de données, des informations financières aux données médicales, tout en un seul endroit.

Pour Qui est IZOData ?
IZOData est idéale pour les individus soucieux de leur vie privée, les entreprises en quête de conformité, et les institutions nécessitant un échange sécurisé d'informations sensibles.

Name: The 8th Layer
Description:
The 8th Layer is a cybersecurity awareness and training platform that focuses on the most vulnerable part of any organisation’s security stack: its people. We simulate real‑world phishing and social‑engineering attacks and turn every mistake into a short, practical lesson so your team becomes safer every month. 

What we do:
Run realistic phishing and scam simulations tailored to Indian contexts (UPI fraud, WhatsApp scams, fake support calls, and more).
Deliver bite‑sized micro‑lessons (2–3 minutes + a 3‑question quiz) right after a user fails a scenario, so learning happens at the moment of risk.
Provide a structured learning path with levels from fundamentals to advanced decision‑making, covering topics like phishing, passwords, device security, and incident response. 
Offer an admin dashboard with risk scores, team progress, and campaign reports, so leaders can see which departments are improving and where human risk is still high. 

Who we serve:
NGOs and impact organisations that handle sensitive data and donor funds but lack full‑time security teams.
Startups and small businesses that want enterprise‑grade awareness training without enterprise pricing.
Colleges and training programs that want a practical, scenario‑based way to teach social‑engineering defense.

Why:
“The 8th Layer” Organisations already invest in seven layers of security – network, endpoint, application, data, and more – but most breaches still start with a human decision. The 8th Layer is dedicated to strengthening that human layer through continuous, hands‑on training, not just one‑time workshops. 

Mission:
Our mission is to make modern cybersecurity awareness simple, practical, and accessible for Indian organisations, so one phishing email or scam call never becomes a multi‑lakh loss.

Description:

Un unico sistema permette alle aziende di centralizzare la raccolta, l’analisi e la gestione dei ticket, garantendo tutela del segnalante e piena conformità normativa.

La piattaforma offre una dashboard unificata, comitato interno con membri illimitati, ruoli distinti (Admin, Committee, CPO) e un canale di segnalazione anonimo tramite token sicuro.
Ogni segnalazione può essere gestita con messaggistica protetta, allegati, note interne e tracciamento completo.

GuardianVox include notifiche automatiche per presa in carico (7 giorni) ed esito (90 giorni), oltre a report PDF, KPI mensili/annuali e audit trail per audit e verifiche interne.
La configurazione del comitato richiede pochi minuti e ogni membro riceve accesso personale con notifiche mirate.

Il sistema supporta anche la gestione dei conflitti di interesse, consentendo al segnalante di escludere ruoli o nominativi specifici.
La sicurezza è garantita da crittografia dei dati, accessi differenziati e totale protezione dell’identità del segnalante.

GuardianVox è ideale per:
• Aziende con più di 50 dipendenti
• Organizzazioni con Modello 231
• Enti pubblici e privati
• Società che necessitano di un canale certificato per la parità di genere
• Consulenti HR, legali e DPO

La compliance non deve essere complessa. Con GuardianVox diventa semplice, centralizzata e immediata.

Scopri di più su  https://guardianvox.it

Name: Anomizr
Description:
AI and Text Processing: Protecting Privacy with Anomizr

Welcome to our LinkedIn page dedicated to AI and Text Processing. We provide a solution, Anomizr, that enables the benefits of AI while safeguarding sensitive information. Join us as we tackle the privacy risks associated with AI-powered text processing.

AI has transformed text processing and NLP, empowering us with chatbots, virtual assistants, content analysis, and translation. However, privacy risks are a concern. Our mission is to address these risks and provide a solution that preserves privacy while leveraging AI capabilities.

Discover Anomizr, our tool that masks sensitive data like names, phone numbers, and addresses while maintaining text context and meaning. With Anomizr, you can confidently use AI and NLP tools, knowing your privacy is protected.

Anomizr follows a three-phase process: Anonymizing replaces sensitive data with generic placeholders while preserving context. Deanonymizing accurately restores original data when needed. We ensure privacy without compromising the efficacy of AI-driven text processing.

Join us in responsibly harnessing AI and text processing. Connect with our team, follow updates, and explore how Anomizr empowers organizations with privacy-preserving text processing.

Visit www.anomizr.com to learn more about Anomizr and unlock AI's potential while safeguarding privacy.

Name: Popupfy
Description:
Popupfy is a no-code platform that helps businesses of all sizes engage visitors and convert them into leads, subscribers, and sales. With Popupfy, you can create beautiful, high-converting popups and forms in minutes without any coding experience.

Popupfy offers a drag-and-drop editor that makes it easy to create custom popups. You can choose from a variety of templates, add your own content, and customize the design to match your brand. Popupfy also offers a variety of targeting options to show your popups to the right people. For example, you can show your popups to visitors who have been on your website for a certain amount of time, or who have visited certain pages.

Once you've created your popup, Popupfy will track its performance so you can see how it's doing. You can see how many people have seen your popup, how many people have clicked on it, and how many people have converted. This information will help you improve your popups so you can get even better results.

Here are some additional benefits of using Popupfy:

Popupfy is easy to use, even for beginners.
Popupfy is affordable, with plans starting at just $19 per month.
Popupfy offers a 14-day free trial, so you can try it before you buy it.
If you're looking for a way to improve your website conversion rates, then Popupfy is the perfect solution for you. Try it today and see the results for yourself!

Name: Post Request
Description:
Post Request is a cybersecurity platform focused on protecting your online payment experiences. With increasing threats like digital skimming, script injection, and compliance drift, we built Post Request to give security and compliance teams real-time visibility into every script running on their web apps.

Our flagship product — the PCI Script Auditor — continuously monitors, classifies, and verifies all third-party and inline scripts against a trusted inventory, issuing real-time alerts for anomalies or unauthorized changes. Name: Remova
Description:
In global commerce, your most valuable assets are your business relationships. But what if your list of suppliers—and customers—was for sale? For most businesses, it already is.

The Hidden Problem

Every time your goods cross a border, a shipping manifest is created. These records, containing sensitive details about the sender, the receiver, and the products being shipped, are scraped from public sources and sold by dozens of 'business intelligence' platforms. This creates a one-way mirror, allowing your competitors to analyze your entire trade network while you are left in the dark.

The Dual-Sided Consequences

This isn't just data; it's a critical vulnerability for every party in the transaction.

For Importers: Competitors can see your suppliers, raw materials, and shipping volumes. This leads directly to supplier poaching, eroding your negotiating leverage and compromising your product sourcing strategy.

For Exporters: Competitors can identify your international customers, map your distribution channels, and target your key markets. This allows them to steal your hard-won market share and undermine your global expansion.

Whether you are buying or selling, your public trade data is being used against you.

Our Solution: The Digital Shield

Remova was founded on a simple principle: your trade relationships should be private. We are the digital shield for global commerce, a Privacy-as-a-Service (PaaS) platform built to close this data loophole and restore your competitive privacy.

Our automated platform is your dedicated privacy advocate, working 24/7 to:

 Protect Future Data: We file for manifest confidentiality at the source (like with U.S. CBP) to prevent new leaks.

 Clean Up the Past: We send systematic takedown requests to over 40 data intelligence platforms to remove your historical records.

 Monitor Continuously: Our engine constantly scans the web for new exposures, ensuring your business relationships stay protected.
Join the movement!

We help scrap suppliers and steel buyers manage their entire transaction process digitally — ensuring transparency, compliance, and real-time visibility at every stage.

Beyond compliance, ScrapDMS helps companies digitize and organize all their business documents, storing them securely on the cloud for over seven years. Each document and record remains encrypted and accessible only with authorized user permissions, ensuring complete data privacy and ownership.
Our philosophy is simple: your data belongs to you — no one can access it without your authorization.

With features like geo-tagged driver photos, automated alerts, and audit-ready digital trails, ScrapDMS creates a paperless, compliant, and transparent ecosystem for scrap management.

By adopting ScrapDMS, companies eliminate manual paperwork, strengthen traceability and accountability, and build trust across every supplier–buyer interaction.

Smart. Secure. Compliant. Digital. Yours. That’s ScrapDMS.

Name: Aspida Security
Description:
At ASPIDA, we believe in a simple, powerful idea: it's time to stop asking for privacy and start enforcing it. Our mission is to build the next generation of proactive security tools that empower individuals to take back control of their digital lives.

The Problem:
In today's digital world, your online accounts are protected by temporary keycards called session cookies. When stolen, these keys allow attackers to bypass passwords and even two-factor authentication in a growing threat known as session hijacking. Meanwhile, a constant barrage of complex cookie banners and confusing privacy settings makes secure browsing a daily chore. Traditional security software is reactive; we believe defense should be proactive.

Our Solution:
ASPIDA is a proactive shield designed to solve these problems at their core. Our software provides two fundamental layers of protection:

Proactive Session Fingerprinting: We actively monitor your secure sessions with our unique defense technology, instantly detecting and blocking any hijacking attempts before they can do harm.

Automated Privacy Enforcement: Our intelligent automation clears the clutter of cookie banners and manages your privacy preferences across the web according to your choices, creating a seamless and truly private experience.

Our Vision:
We are building a safer, cleaner internet—one user at a time. Follow us for updates on our launch, insights into the world of cybersecurity, and to join our mission to make proactive security accessible to everyone. To get early access to our product, visit our website and join the waitlist.

Our AI-integrated, zero-trust desktop platform replaces outdated VDI and legacy setups with a cloud-native, compliance-ready infrastructure built for BFSI, GovTech, and HealthTech sectors.
Engineered with enterprise-grade security, JupitoDeeptech helps reduce desktop vulnerabilities and ransomware attack surfaces, creating a resilient workspace layer for mission-critical environments.

Our DLP engine integrates with Windows DLP, enforcing compliance across sessions — without installation on client devices.
The platform features an advanced VNC Server compatible with Windows and Linux, supporting GPU acceleration, session recording, audio streaming, secure file transfer, and policy-based access control. We also support Windows RDP, offering flexibility for mixed or legacy environments.
With JupitoDeeptech, enterprises can:
• Deploy secure, ephemeral desktops with no data persistence
• Enforce zero-trust and DLP policies — without client-side software
• Access internal or edge systems securely via teleconnector (behind NAT)
• Reduce vulnerabilities and ransomware attack exposure
• Automate and optimize workloads through AI orchestration
• Maintain compliance across hybrid or multi-cloud environments
Why JupitoDeeptech?
Purpose-built for regulated industries, our platform unifies security, compliance, and scalability into a single workspace solution. Backed by NVIDIA, Microsoft for Startups, and incubated in NCoE, we’re collaborating with banks, enterprises, and system integrators to pilot and scale deployments.

Description:
At Pyxis Cyber, we build mission-critical software that removes friction, waste, and ambiguity from cybersecurity and compliance across the Defense Industrial Base. Our products are engineered for defense and space contractors that need automation, accuracy, and continuous audit readiness without adding headcount or complexity.

ComplyGrid

Self-Assessment and Compliance Program Management for the Defense Industrial Base

ComplyGrid is a self-assessment and compliance management platform built for Defense Industrial Base contractors operating under CMMC Level 2 and NIST SP 800-171.

It provides a structured, repeatable system for managing compliance activities, evidence, and remediation efforts in support of annual affirmations and sustained readiness for third-party assessments.

Core capabilities include:

• Centralized tracking of NIST SP 800-171 controls and mapped CMMC Level 2 practices
• Structured evidence collection, classification, tagging, and lifecycle management
• POA&M tracking with ownership, status, and remediation workflow visibility
• Control-level assessment status and justification tracking
• Task assignment and workflow coordination across technical and business teams
• Executive and compliance dashboards for real-time program visibility

ComplyGrid replaces spreadsheets, email-driven coordination, and fragmented tooling with a disciplined system of record for compliance management. It is designed to support internal self-assessments and management oversight, without performing assessments, certifications, or generating authoritative compliance artifacts.

ComplyGrid enables defense contractors to maintain an accurate, continuously managed compliance posture and engage with C3PAOs from a position of preparation and clarity.

Name: Trust Shield
Description:
TrustShield is the developer-first firewall for your signup form.
We help SaaS founders and engineering teams detect disposable email addresses, block bots, and protect their sender reputation in real-time.
The Problem:
Regex validation is no longer enough. There are over 70,000 disposable email providers (yopmail, tempmail, sharklasers), and new ones appear every day. Fake users skew your analytics, inflate your database costs, and damage your email deliverability rates (Gmail/Outlook spam filters).
The Solution:
TrustShield provides a high-performance REST API that validates email reputation in sub-50ms latency. We maintain the world's largest open-source blocklist so you don't have to.
Why Developers Choose TrustShield:
 Sub-50ms Latency: Running on Vercel Edge with O(1) in-memory lookups. We don't slow down your UX.
 72,000+ Blocked Domains: Our database is updated daily to catch new threats.
 Stack Agnostic: Works with Next.js, Python, Go, Node.js, and PHP.
 Secure & Private: We do not store your user data. We simply validate reputation and return a verdict.
Use Cases:
Auth Middleware: Block fake users before they hit your auth.users table (Clerk/Supabase/Auth0).
Newsletter Protection: Stop bots from flooding your CRM (HubSpot/Resend/Mailchimp).
Database Cleanup: Audit your existing user base to identify low-quality leads.
