Name: MoDE KIT
Description:
The COVID-19 pandemic, which began in late 2019, led to widespread challenges, notably in education. In Singapore, the government implemented strict "circuit breaker" measures, requiring schools to shift to Home Based Learning. However, many students, particularly those from low-income families, struggled to access the necessary technology for remote education. Many lacked computers, tablets, or smartphones, hindering their ability to keep up with studies. Recognizing this issue, volunteer organizations began urging businesses to donate obsolete devices. Concerns over data privacy and corporate confidentiality, however, deterred many companies from participating in recycling efforts. 

Fortunately, a partnership formed between a volunteer organization and Data Terminator Pte Ltd (DT), which specializes in data destruction services. DT offered to erase data from donated devices without charging labor costs, alleviating companies’ fears. However, initial data erasure methods were inefficient. Over two years, DT collaborated with the Singapore Agency for Science, Technology and Research to create the MoDE KIT, a user-friendly device capable of erasing data from up to four devices concurrently. This innovation not only supports educational equity by providing technology to those in need but also promotes sustainability by reducing e-waste and enhancing data security practices among businesses.

Today, the MoDE KIT has become a crucial security tool, offering a cost-effective solution for the secure erasure of data on mobile devices, contributing to a sustainable future of our planet.

Name: BLOCKSENSYS
Description: Ninety-seven percent of all cyber-attacks target Personally Identifiable Digital Identity (PIDI) data. Large databases containing sensitive PIDI data, managed by the public and private sectors, have been breached, resulting in significant identity theft and monetary loss. The problem persists and continues to grow as the world population grows. Distributed Ledger Blockchain (DLB) technology is an immutable peer-to-peer proof-of-transaction database network system that can resist cyber-attacks on PIDI data by 97%. Additional solutions of value include: lower maintenance costs, lower administrative resources, higher sustainability, and a contact-free method for PIDI data transfer. This technology’s unique trait lies in how it decentralizes PIDI data into a distributed network of ledger copies. This product, currently in the prototype phase, is called the Blockchain Digital Identity Management System (BDIMS). In addition, Blockchain adoption research suggests that, if an end user’s personal beliefs about how they believe their PIDI data should be managed aligns with how Blockchain manages it, then the end-user is significantly more likely to adopt the BDIMS (Sindi, 2019). This is the service side of the business where the Blockchain Adoption Research Framework (Sindi, 2019) is utilized to thoroughly measure the adoption of a BDIMS into a particular context. The application of the BDIMS will be to any type of identification verification and validation process, which may include, but not limited to, voting ballot, refugee geolocation, driver’s license, passport, power of attorney, birth certificate, marriage certificate, divorce certificate, escrow, academic transcripts, social security, and property deed official documentation. The total addressable market is 7.8 billion end-users.

Name: Alive Login
Description:
ALIVE LOGIN’S APPLOCKER. ALIVE BIOMETRIC IDENTIFICATION AUTHENTICATION ACCESS CONTROL SECURITY SYSTEM.
Locked apps can only be accessed by the authorized user. Alive Login’s solution: Biometric Voice Authentication/Recognition software infused with several AI systems. The systems: Alive Biometric's and our Alive Voice Match Random Word Revolver are "living passwords". The “living passwords” are random words presented to the user. The words are prerecorded words from the user voice that are stored in the device/server from the user’s prior setup for the Alive Voice Match Random Word Revolver Security System word library. The words appear at random within in a limited amount of time. The user is required to speak the words as they appear. The Alive Voice Match then does a comparison analysis between the prerecorded word verses the live spoken word. If the words pass the similarity voice authentication test at the preset level, Alive Login’s Applocker grants access to the locked app. It is simple, quick, easy, and extremely secure. Alive Login is an easy login password system. When you login all you need is your username and your voice, Alive Password will do the rest. After you have entered your username, you will be provided with one, two or three (3) random words from your word library. Once the words are presented, you speak the words. You will be granted access once your voice speaking the presented words is authenticated. The beauty to this solution is the simplicity! The random living passwords are provided from your personal recorded word library. The user just speaks the word and/or words presented and that is it! As easy as one, two, three! Every day we hear of another cybersecurity breach and most of the time we don't hear about the breach until months later! How many out there have experienced the following: To many login attempts? Wrong password or user login? Forget password? You need a new password?

Our platform facilitates secure data exchange between the Owner and the Consumer, starting with establishing mutual trust through our unique, patent-pending authentication process utilizing Decentralized Identifiers (DID) and Zero-Knowledge Proofs (ZKP) coupled with proprietary matrix transformation. Once trust is confirmed, the data is encrypted right at the Owner's device and remains entirely encrypted—using Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) and Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE)—as it is shared, stored, and processed. Crucially, even after sharing, the Owner maintains complete control over how the data is used, setting rules for its purpose, allowed actions, and shelf-life, all enforced by our patent-pending Enhanced Attribute-Based Access Control (ABAC++). To ensure transparency and compliance, every single action is immutably logged and auditable, and a unique, transaction-specific self-destruction mechanism ensures the data disappears when its utility expires.

Time savings: Assessments complete in 20–25 minutes, replacing days of manual work

Automated assessments with customizable rule sets

Professional PDF reports suitable for audits

The fundamental principle underlying everything we build is simple: the person closest to the source of truth is the best one to establish it. Identity begins with the individual. Ownership begins with the creator. Authorization begins with the authorized party. Our infrastructure enables each of these to be established at the source,  cryptographically bound, independently verifiable, and under the control of the person who knows the truth firsthand.
    
Optio provides the infrastructure to establish that verification cryptographically, at the source, under the control of the individual. We've built the foundational layers: hardware-bound identity that cannot be stolen or transferred, bidirectional verification where both parties prove who they are, and orchestration that creates immutable proof of every trust decision. From this foundation, we address content authenticity, financial transaction integrity, enterprise access control, and asset protection—not as separate products chasing separate effects, but as applications of a single, principled architecture.
